english: This is a message for A.J.E FOUNDRY.  We've received your samples and can report that they have passed comfortably within our engineering tolerances.  You are formally approved as licensed industry partners, and may now manufacture all items in our design manifest.
translation: Dette er en meddelelse til A.J.E FOUNDRY. Vi har modtaget jeres prøver og kan rapportere, at de ligger komfortabelt inden for vores ingeniørtolerancer. I er formelt godkendt som licenserede industripartnere og må nu fremstille alle genstande i vores designmanifest.

english: Batches of completed parts may now be submitted to the Andromeda Project through the open Marketplace. You will find our buyers ready to release funds for any parts manufactured to specification.
translation: Partier af færdige komponenter kan nu indsendes til Andromeda-projektet via det åbne Markedsplads. Du vil finde vores købere klar til at frigive midler for alle dele fremstillet efter specifikation.

english: Thank you for your endeavours, and good luck.
translation: Tak for din indsats, og held og lykke.

english: The later phases of this project will no doubt be much more involved.  But we are perfectly positioned to capitalise on this opportunity.  And there is a lot of opportunity to be had.
translation: De senere faser af dette projekt vil uden tvivl være meget mere omfattende. Men vi er perfekt positioneret til at udnytte denne mulighed. Og der er rigeligt med muligheder at hente.

english: There are individuals behind this mega-project with wealth and resources far beyond my comprehension.  But their ambitions far exceed the capabilities of the other ships and people in this sector.  They are going to need our help.
translation: Der står enkeltpersoner bag dette mega-projekt med rigdom og ressourcer langt ud over min forståelse. Men deres ambitioner overstiger langt kapabiliteterne hos de andre skibe og folk i denne sektor. De vil få brug for vores hjælp.

english: We can take a short break, and I'll give you a call when I'm ready to start work on the next phase of the stargate project. You might want to stop some of your equipment in the meantime, we don't want to waste anything!
translation: Vi kan tage en kort pause, og jeg ringer til dig, når jeg er klar til at starte arbejdet på næste fase af Stargate-projektet. Du vil måske stoppe noget af dit udstyr i mellemtiden – vi vil ikke spilde noget!

english: We need to tidy up the mess, but nothing needs to be wasted.  We can recycle all of the raw materials found on this station.
translation: Vi er nødt til at rydde op i rodet, men intet skal gå til spilde. Vi kan genbruge alle råmaterialerne, der findes på denne station.

english: There is an industrial smelter among the boxed equipment.  Install it and power it up, then set it to recycling all of the scrap metal.  This will give us an early supply of Metal Ingots.  A critical resource in manufacturing anything.
translation: Der er et industrielt smelteværk blandt det pakkede udstyr. Installer det og tænd for det, og indstil det derefter til at genbruge alt skrotmetal. Dette vil give os en tidlig forsyning af metalstænger – en kritisk ressource i fremstillingen af alt.

english: If I could draw your attention to this schematic issued by the Andromeda Project.  You can see it's actually quite a simple part.  This is just a structural framework, onto which they'll build everything else.
translation: Hvis jeg må henlede din opmærksomhed på dette diagram udstedt af Andromeda-projektet. Du kan se, at det faktisk er en ret simpel del. Dette er blot en strukturel ramme, hvorpå de vil bygge alt det øvrige.

english: We can manufacture these parts in just two stages out of Metal Ingots.  I've left a boxed Fabricator and an Assembly Table on the station.  Set them up next to each other, ideally near to the Metal Ingots.
translation: Vi kan fremstille disse dele i blot to trin ud fra metalstænger. Jeg har efterladt en pakket fabrikator og et monteringsbord på stationen. Installer dem ved siden af hinanden, helst tæt på metalstængerne.

english: Once they're installed, set the Fabricator to manufacture Frames, then set the Assembly Table to specialise them into finished Stargate Frames.  It's simple stuff, but eventually we will need a huge throughput.
translation: Når de er installeret, skal du indstille fabrikatoren til at fremstille rammer, og derefter indstille monteringsbordet til at specialisere dem til færdige Stargate-rammer. Det er simpelt, men til sidst får vi brug for en enorm gennemstrømning.

english: They want us to provide an initial batch of 10 Stargate Frames, for certification.  They'll inspect our work and we'll be approved as official partners in the Andromeda Project.
translation: De vil have, at vi leverer en indledende batch på 10 Stargate-rammer til certificering. De vil inspicere vores arbejde, og vi vil blive godkendt som officielle partnere i Andromeda-projektet.

english: It shouldn't take too long.  If you run out of metal, remember you can recycle more of the ruined equipment around the facility.
translation: Det burde ikke tage for lang tid. Hvis du løber tør for metal, så husk, at du kan genbruge mere af det ødelagte udstyr rundt på faciliteten.

english: Call Alexander about the production facility
translation: Ring til Alexander angående produktions faciliteten

english: Set Assembly Table to Stargate Frames
Excellent.  Let's have a look at the Manifest that he mentioned, and see what is required next.
translation: Fremragende. Lad os tage et kig på manifestet, som han nævnte, og se, hvad der kræves næste gang.

english: I knew this would be a very profitable endeavour for us.  The Andromeda Project are so desperately in need of reliable manufacturing facilities that they're paying a fortune.
translation: Jeg vidste, at dette ville blive en meget profitabel indsats for os. Andromeda-projektet har så desperat brug for pålidelige produktionsfaciliteter, at de betaler en formue.

english: Now, the sales revenue is going to flow through you.  But remember our agreement.  50/50.  I've put a lot of capital in to get us to this point, and I need to start seeing a return.
translation: Nu vil salgsindtægterne løbe gennem dig. Men husk vores aftale: 50/50. Jeg har lagt meget kapital i for at få os hertil, og jeg er nødt til at begynde at se et afkast.

english: Every time you sell a batch of parts to the Andromeda Project, you'll owe me half the revenue.  I'd appreciate it if you'd pay promptly.
translation: Hver gang du sælger en batch dele til Andromeda-projektet, skylder du mig halvdelen af indtægten. Jeg vil sætte pris på, hvis du betaler straks.

english: It looks like it's just a bulk order of the part we already provided.  We need to make 200 more Stargate Frames.  We're already manufacturing them, but we'll need to scale up production or else this will take forever.
translation: Det ser ud til, at det blot er en stor ordre af den del, vi allerede har leveret. Vi skal fremstille 200 flere Stargate-rammer. Vi producerer dem allerede, men vi bliver nødt til at øge produktionen, ellers vil det tage evigheder.

english: I'm releasing some of the seed money to you.  $600,000 should be enough for you to buy all the equipment we need to scale up.  Remember this isn't a gift.  I still own this station, and all the equipment onboard.
translation: Jeg frigiver noget af startkapitalen til dig. $600.000 burde være nok til, at du kan købe alt det udstyr, vi har brug for for at øge produktionen. Husk, dette er ikke en gave. Jeg ejer stadig denne station og alt udstyret ombord.

english: I suggest you buy more Smelters, more Fabricators, and more Assembly Tables.  A couple of each at least.  All that equipment will draw more juice, so you'll need to expand the power network with more Reactors and Batteries to cope.  And you'll need more crew to do the work.
translation: Jeg foreslår, at du køber flere smelteværker, flere fabrikatorer og flere monteringsborde – mindst et par af hver. Alt det udstyr vil trække mere strøm, så du bliver nødt til at udvide strømnettet med flere reaktorer og batterier for at klare det. Og du får brug for flere besætningsmedlemmer til at udføre arbejdet.

english: If you run out of Metal Ingots, you should be able to buy raw materials from the open Marketplace.  You can usually buy more Scrap Metal, but you'll also find Metallic Minerals for sale which can also be smelted into Metal Ingots.
translation: Hvis du løber tør for metalstænger, burde du kunne købe råmaterialer på det åbne marked. Du kan normalt købe mere skrot metal, men du vil også finde metalliske mineraler til salg, som også kan smeltes til metal stænger.

english: Wonderful news. I'm very happy you've agreed to partner with me on this. My factory space station is in position nearby, ready for us to use as our base of operations.
translation: Vidunderlige nyheder. Jeg er meget glad for, at du har indvilliget i at indgå partnerskab med mig om dette. Min fabriksrumstation er placeret i nærheden og klar til, at vi kan bruge den som vores operationsbase.

english: This is the A.J.E Foundry.  A wonderful industrial facility, perfect for our needs.  I'll just need to provide you with some access codes so you can assume control of the facility.
translation: Dette er A.J.E Foundry. En fremragende industrifacilitet, perfekt til vores behov. Jeg skal bare give dig nogle adgangskoder, så du kan overtage kontrollen med faciliteten.

english: Look at that.  For years I manufactured engines and FTL drives right here, for every fleet that passed through the sector.  It's really fallen into disrepair.
translation: Se lige det. I årevis har jeg fremstillet motorer og FTL-drev lige her, til alle flåder, der passerede gennem sektoren. Det er virkelig forfaldet.

english: Your first job is to send over a skeleton crew, and establish basic power generation and life support.  I had the previous crew box up some of the usable equipment.  You should find the parts you need are already in storage.
translation: Din første opgave er at sende en mindre besætning og etablere grundlæggende strømforsyning og livsstøtte. Jeg fik den tidligere besætning til at pakke noget af det brugbare udstyr ned. Du burde finde, at de dele, du har brug for, allerede er på lager.

english: Efficiency is going to be the key to this facility turning a profit.  Set up a storage zone for scrap metal near to your Smelter, and another for the Metal Ingots that come out.  Our crew will waste a lot less time carrying goods long distances.
translation: Effektivitet bliver nøglen til, at denne facilitet kan generere profit. Opret en lagerzone til skrotmetal nær dit smelteværk, og en anden til de metalstænger, der kommer ud. Vores besætning vil spilde meget mindre tid på at transportere varer over lange afstande.

english: I propose we expand and upgrade the Station into a mining facility.  If we install Engines we can move to a rich asteroid vein, then Mining Lasers and Logistics Drones will give us the capability to harvest the raw materials we need.
translation: Jeg foreslår, at vi udvider og opgraderer stationen til en minedriftsfacilitet. Hvis vi installerer motorer, kan vi flytte til et rigt asteroidebælte, og derefter vil minedriftslasere og logistikdroner give os mulighed for at udvinde de råmaterialer, vi har brug for.

english: The Stargate Actuators are made on the Assembly Table as normal, and they require a Stargate Frame and a Motor. Motors can be made in fabricators.
translation: Stargate-aktuatorerne fremstilles på monteringsbordet som normalt, og de kræver en Stargate-ramme og en motor. Motorer kan laves i fabrikatorer.

english: You'll need to mine Metallic Minerals and Copper Minerals, then melt those materials into ingots in an array of Smelters.  You can then fabricate the Motors and Frames, and finally assemble them into Stargate Actuators.
translation: Du bliver nødt til at udvinde metalliske mineraler og kobbermineraler, og derefter smelte disse materialer til metalstænger i en række smelteværker. Du kan derefter fremstille motorerne og rammerne, og til sidst samle dem til Stargate-aktuatorer.

english: I'll release some more of the seed capital to cover the costs of the upgrade, but you can take care of the details.
translation: Jeg frigiver lidt mere startkapital for at dække omkostningerne ved opgraderingen, men du kan tage dig af detaljerne.

english: Captain, I think it's time we resumed work on the Stargate contract.  I've had a look ahead and the next phase is a huge step up.  Give me a call when you're ready to continue work.
translation: Kaptajn, jeg synes, det er på tide, at vi genoptager arbejdet på Stargate-kontrakten. Jeg har set fremad, og næste fase er et stort skridt op. Ring til mig, når du er klar til at fortsætte arbejdet.

english: However, nothing they're asking us to produce is impossible, and I have a strong personal interest in seeing this project completed.  The sooner the better.
translation: Dog er intet af det, de beder os producere, umuligt, og jeg har en stærk personlig interesse i at få dette projekt fuldført. Jo før, jo bedre.

english: The Andromeda Project have released specifications for three different components.  We need to manufacture large quantities of all three to complete this phase, and each will require a different industrial setup.
translation: Andromeda-projektet har udgivet specifikationer for tre forskellige komponenter. Vi skal fremstille store mængder af alle tre for at fuldføre denne fase, og hver vil kræve en forskellig industriel opsætning.

english: The second part is a chemical compound they're calling Stargate Resin.  It's synthesised in a Chemical Lab, but we first need huge volumes of Metreon Gas.  It's found only in deep space nebulas.
translation: Den anden del er en kemisk forbindelse, de kalder Stargate-harpiks. Den syntetiseres i et kemilaboratorium, men vi har først brug for store mængder Metreon-gas. Den findes kun i dybe rum-Tågen.

english: My thinking is to buy a suitable fuselage from a Shipyard, and then convert it into a dedicated gas capture and refining facility.  There's a good ship nearby.  You can buy it on my behalf and then set it up, and we'll drop it off in a rich gas cloud and leave it running.
translation: Min tanke er at købe et passende skrog fra et skibsværft og derefter omdanne det til en dedikeret facilitet til opsamling og raffinering af gas. Der ligger et godt skib i nærheden. Du kan købe det på mine vegne og derefter opsætte det, så vi placerer det i en rig gas-sky og lader det køre.

english: The final requirement is a few barrels of Stable Isotopes.  These are easily captured during routine FTL travel.  I think you can take care of this one yourself, but if necessary I can talk you through it.
translation: Det sidste krav er et par tønder stabile isotoper. Disse kan nemt opsamles under rutinemæssige FTL-rejser. Jeg tror, du kan klare denne del selv, men hvis det er nødvendigt, kan jeg guide dig igennem det.

english: It's not too complex.  It starts with a Hyperspace Scoop, or several ideally, that you can fit to your vessels.  Every time you make an FTL jump you'll collect more as you pass through hyperspace.  You can then pipe those isotopes into a Refinery and convert them into Stable Isotopes.
translation: Det er ikke så kompliceret. Det starter med en Hyperspace Scoop eller helst flere som du kan montere på dine skibe. Hver gang du laver et FTL-spring samler du mere op når du passerer gennem hyperspace. Du kan derefter føre disse isotoper ind i et Raffinaderi og omdanne dem til Stabile isotoper.

english: The final stage is to install a Loader or two, and set them to 'UNLOAD'.  This will instruct your crew to barrel up the stable isotopes and store them in the cargo hold so you can easily sell them on the Marketplace.
translation: Den sidste fase er at installere en Loader eller to og sætte dem til 'UNLOAD'. Dette instruerer din besætning i at tønde de stabile isotoper og opbevare dem i lastrummet så du nemt kan sælge dem på Markedspladsen.

english: OPTIONAL: Install engines in the A.J.E Foundry
translation: VALGFRIT: Installér motorer i A.J.E Foundry

english: Sell your manufactured parts to submit them to the Stargate project
translation: Sælg dine fremstillede dele for at indsende dem til Stargate-projektet.

english: Take control of the A.J.E Foundry
Transport the Gas Collector to a Nebula
Begin unloading barrels of Stable Isotopes [*X/10]
There is a ship for sale here that's perfect for our gas collection enterprise.  Let's buy it and add it to the fleet.
translation: Der er et skib til salg her, som er perfekt til vores gasopsamlingsforetagende. Lad os købe det og tilføje det til flåden.

english: Gas collection is a slow process.  Our aim should be to place this vessel within a dense metreon nebula, slowly absorbing the gas and refining it over time.  Once we're in the nebula we won't be able to easily upgrade the ship, so we'll want to set it up as much as possible in advance.
translation: Gasopsamling er en langsom proces. Vores mål bør være at placere dette fartøj i en tæt metreon-nebula og langsomt absorbere gassen og raffinere den over tid. Når vi først er i nebulaen, vil vi ikke nemt kunne opgradere skibet, så vi vil gerne opsætte det så meget som muligt på forhånd.

english: I'll send over more seed money and you can outfit the ship as you see best.
translation: Jeg sender mere startkapital, og du kan udstyre skibet, som du finder bedst.

english: The process of making Stargate Resin starts with a Gas Collector bringing in the Metreon Gas.  We then pipe that into a Refinery to produce Refined Metreon, then into a Chemical Lab where the Stargate Resin can be synthesised.
translation: Processen med at fremstille Stargate-harpiks starter med, at en gasopsamler bringer Metreon-gassen ind. Vi fører den derefter via rør til et raffinaderi for at producere raffineret Metreon, og derefter til et kemilaboratorium, hvor Stargate-harpiksen kan syntetiseres.

english: You may need to shop around a bit, if the local trade post doesn't have everything you need.
translation: Du bliver muligvis nødt til at kigge dig lidt omkring, hvis den lokale handelsstation ikke har alt, hvad du har brug for.

english: Once the ship is ready, pair it up with one of your FTL capable vessels, and jump into a nearby nebula to begin the process of gas collection.
translation: Når skibet er klar, par det med et af dine FTL-kompatible fartøjer, og hop ind i en nærliggende nebula for at begynde gasopsamlingsprocessen.

english: Resume work on the Stargate with X
translation: Genoptag arbejdet på Stargate med X

english: I'm going to take a short break from the project, I trust you'll be able to do the next couple of stages on your own.
translation: Jeg tager en kort pause fra projektet, men jeg stoler på, at du selv kan klare de næste faser.

english: You should know that my Doctors continue to bring me bad news.  Each time I talk to them... well, I don't know how long I have left.  This will be my final project.  I just hope I have time to finish it.
translation: Du bør vide at mine læger fortsat bringer mig dårlige nyheder. Hver gang jeg taler med dem... jeg ved ikke hvor længe jeg har tilbage. Dette bliver mit sidste projekt. Jeg håber blot at jeg når at færdiggøre det.
Industrier i det dybe rum, del 2

english: I'm disappointed, Captain. You're backing out after all the investment I've put into this project?
translation: Jeg er skuffet, kaptajn. Trækker du dig nu efter al den investering, jeg har lagt i dette projekt?

english: You will lose access to all the ships I've provided, are you sure you want to do this?
translation: Du vil miste adgangen til alle de skibe, jeg har stillet til rådighed. Er du sikker på, at du vil gøre dette?

english: How dare you! I still have the access keys. You will no longer be a part of this enterprise.
translation: Hvordan vover du! Jeg har stadig adgangsnøglerne. Du vil ikke længere være en del af dette foretagende.

english: Captain, I can see you've sold a batch of Stargate parts, but I've received no corresponding payment.  We agreed to split all revenue 50/50.  This setup is costing me a fortune and I need to start making my return.  Please transfer the funds to my account as soon as possible.
translation: Kaptajn, jeg kan se, at du har solgt en batch Stargate-dele, men jeg har ikke modtaget nogen tilsvarende betaling. Vi aftalte at dele al indtægt 50/50. Denne opsætning koster mig en formue, og jeg er nødt til at begynde at få mit afkast. Overfør venligst midlerne til min konto så hurtigt som muligt.

english: Captain, I was sure I'd made our agreement clear.  Don't forget who owns this station, and all the equipment onboard.  50/50 was what we agreed.
translation: Kaptajn, jeg var sikker på, at jeg havde gjort vores aftale klar. Glem ikke, hvem der ejer denne station og alt udstyret ombord. 50/50 var, hvad vi blev enige om.

english: Captain, I was sure I'd made our agreement clear.  Don't forget who owns this station, and all the equipment onboard.  50/50 was what we agreed.
translation: Kaptajn, jeg var sikker på, at jeg havde gjort vores aftale klar. Glem ikke, hvem der ejer denne station og alt udstyret ombord. 50/50 var, hvad vi blev enige om.

english: I thought I could trust you.  Pay me the money you owe, immediately, or I will be forced to escalate.
translation: Jeg troede, jeg kunne stole på dig. Betal mig de penge, du skylder, med det samme, ellers bliver jeg nødt til at eskalere situationen.

english: Captain, this is your final warning.  You are now willfully withholding sales revenue that is legally mine.  If you don't pay what you owe immediately I will have no choice but to terminate our agreement, seize control of my station, and recover any financial losses directly from you.
translation: Kaptajn, dette er din sidste advarsel. Du tilbageholder nu med vilje salgsindtægter, som lovligt tilhører mig. Hvis du ikke betaler det, du skylder, med det samme, vil jeg ikke have andet valg end at opsige vores aftale, overtage kontrollen med min station og inddrive eventuelle økonomiske tab direkte fra dig.

english: Every colonised planet you visit will have civilians in need of evacuation.
translation: Hver koloniseret planet du besøger vil have civile der har brug for evakuering.

english: You will need to expand your habitation deck and even upgrade to a larger ship eventually.
translation: Du vil skulle udvide dit beboelsesdæk og til sidst opgradere til et større skib.

english: Some of our scientists don't believe the void collapse can ever be stopped.
translation: Nogle af vores forskere mener ikke at void collapse nogensinde kan stoppes.

english: If that's true then billions of people are going to need evacuation from our home planets.
translation: Hvis det er sandt, vil milliarder af mennesker få brug for evakuering fra vores hjemverdener.

english: There has never been an evacuation of so many people at once.
translation: Der har aldrig været en evakuering af så mange mennesker på én gang.

english: And we don't even know where we can go that will be safe.
translation: Og vi ved ikke engang hvor vi kan tage hen som vil være sikkert.

english: Next bonus upon evacuation of *X civilians : $*Y.
translation: Næste bonus ved evakuering af *X civile : $*Y.

english: You have evacuated *X civilians from doomed home worlds.
translation: Du har evakueret *X civile fra dødsdømte hjemverdener.

english:
STOCKPILE

When ticked, the produced items will be immediately unloaded into any cargo storage area, stockpiling the item.

If unticked, the produced item will remain until it is used somewhere, or until there is specific cargo space available.
translation:
LAGEROPBYGNING

Når aktiveret bliver de producerede genstande straks aflæsset i et vilkårligt lagerområde, så genstanden oplagres.

Hvis deaktiveret bliver den producerede genstand liggende indtil den bruges et sted, eller indtil der er specifik lagerplads tilgængelig.

english: This will be the final journey of your fleet.\nBe prepared for a long journey to the Andromeda galaxy, and save as many as you can!
translation: Dette bliver din flådes sidste rejse.\nForbered dig på en lang rejse til Andromeda-galaksen og red så mange som muligt!

english: Creative Mode will end when you jump to hyperspace
translation: Kreativ tilstand afsluttes når du springer til hyperspace

english: Ship cannot enter hyperspace with your fleet
translation: Skibet kan ikke gå i hyperspace sammen med din flåde

english: Ship is controlled by interstellar logistics
Ship needs either hull or scaffolding to be brought into hyperspace
translation: Skibet skal have enten skrog eller stillads for at kunne bringes i hyperspace

english: This equipment can not function properly when installed in this position.
translation: Dette udstyr kan ikke fungere korrekt når det installeres i denne position.
JUMPGATE OFFLINE PÅ GRUND AF SKADE
ALLE SKIBE SKAL IND I JUMPGATE

english: WARNING - LAST FTL CHARGE\nCANNOT BUY AT DESTINATION
translation: ADVARSEL - SIDSTE FTL-OPLADNING\nKAN IKKE KØBES VED DESTINATIONEN

english: Allow crew members to load this crate.\n\nIf disabled then only robot arms can load.
translation: Tillad besætningsmedlemmer at læsse denne kasse.\n\nHvis deaktiveret kan kun robotarme læsse.

english: Allow crew members to unload from this crate.\n\nIf disabled then only robot arms can unload.
translation: Tillad besætningsmedlemmer at aflæsse fra denne kasse.\n\nHvis deaktiveret kan kun robotarme aflæsse.

english: The number of items or stacks of the chosen type that is being stored.
translation: Antallet af genstande eller stakke af den valgte type som opbevares.

english: The type that the storage crate will be storing.
translation: Den type som lagerkassen vil opbevare.

english: You should repair the damage to your ship at a SHIPYARD.
translation: Du bør reparere skaden på dit skib på et SKIBSVÆRFT.

english: You must travel to a Colony or Shipyard to trade
translation: Du skal rejse til en Koloni eller et Skibsværft for at handle

english: With Andromeda HQ captured, Cmdr Harken and the Intergalactic Security Council will dismantle the Andromeda Project conglomerate and regain control of the Stargate, for the benefit of all mankind.  A new chapter has begun, as mankind expands beyond our home galaxy and into the future.
translation: Med Andromeda Hovedkvarter erobret vil Kommandør Harken og Det Intergalaktiske Sikkerhedsråd afvikle Andromeda-projektets konglomerat og genvinde kontrollen over Stargaten til gavn for hele menneskeheden. Et nyt kapitel er begyndt, mens menneskeheden udvider sig ud over vores hjemgalakse og ind i fremtiden.

english: Travelled to system S*X through Stargate
translation: Rejste til system S*X gennem Stargate

english: Transferred *X R*Y from L*Z - destination storage full
translation: Overførte *X R*Y fra L*Z - modtagerlager fyldt

english: Transferred *X R*Y from L*Z out of the *P desired - destination storage full
translation: Overførte *X R*Y fra L*Z ud af de *P ønskede - modtagerlager fyldt

english: Transferred *X R*Y from L*Z out of the *P desired - insufficient cargo
translation: Overførte *X R*Y fra L*Z ud af de *P ønskede

english: Transferred *X R*Y to L*Z - destination storage full
translation: Overførte *X R*Y til L*Z - modtagerlager fyldt

english: Transferred *X R*Y to L*Z out of the *P desired - destination storage full
translation: Overførte *X R*Y til L*Z ud af de *P ønskede - modtagerlager fyldt

english: Transferred *X R*Y to L*Z out of the *P desired - insufficient cargo
translation: Overførte *X R*Y til L*Z ud af de *P ønskede

english: Bought *X R*Y for $*Z out of the *P desired - insufficient funds
translation: Købte *X R*Y for $*Z ud af de *P ønskede - utilstrækkelige kreditter

english: Bought *X R*Y for $*Z out of the *P desired - insufficient supply
translation: Købte *X R*Y for $*Z ud af de *P ønskede - utilstrækkelig forsyning

english: Bought *X R*Y out of the *Z desired - insufficient funds
translation: Købte *X R*Y ud af de *Z ønskede - utilstrækkelige kreditter

english: Bought *X R*Y out of the *Z desired - insufficient supply
translation: Købte *X R*Y ud af de *Z ønskede - utilstrækkelig forsyning

english: Collected *X R*Y (*Z containers) in T*P - storage full
translation: Indsamlede *X R*Y (*Z containers) i T*P - lager fuldt

english: Collected *X R*Y (*Z containers on board, *P desired) - storage full
translation: Indsamlet *X R*Y (*Z containers on board, *P desired) - lager fuldt

english: Mined *X R*Y (*Z stacks on board, *P desired) - storage full
translation: Udvundet *X R*Y (*Z stacks on board, *P desired) - lager fuldt

english: Mined *X R*Y (*Z stacks) in T*P - storage full
translation: Udvandt *X R*Y (*Z stacks) i T*P - lager fuldt

english: Sold *X R*Y for $*Z out of the *P desired - insufficient cargo
translation: Solgte *X R*Y for $*Z ud af de *P ønskede - utilstrækkelig forsyning

english: Sold *X R*Y out of the *P desired - insufficient cargo
translation: Solgte *X R*Y ud af de *P ønskede - utilstrækkelig forsyning

english: Transferring *X R*Y from L*Z out of the *P desired - insufficient cargo
translation: Overfører *X R*Y fra L*Z ud af de *P ønskede

english: Transferring *X R*Y to L*Z out of the *P desired - insufficient cargo
translation: Overfører *X R*Y til L*Z ud af de *P ønskede

english: L*X does not have a working R*Y
translation: L*X har ikke en fungerende R*Y

english: System S*X does not have any R*Y to collect
translation: System S*X har ingen R*Y at indsamle

english: System S*X does not have any R*Y to mine
translation: System S*X har ingen R*Y at udvinde

english: L*X does not have any R*Ys
Stargate is not ready for jump
translation: Stargate er ikke klar til spring

english: System S*X does not have a trading post
Hide extra options for this order
translation: Skjul ekstra indstillinger for denne ordre

english: Show extra options for this order
translation: Vis ekstra indstillinger for denne ordre

english: This order does not require an item
translation: Denne ordre kræver ikke en genstand
Spring den aktuelt udførte ordre over

english: Create epic space battles between fleets of ships and watch the carnage unfold.
translation: Skab episke rumslag mellem flåder af skibe og se ødelæggelserne udfolde sig.

english: Create epic space battles between fleets of ships and watch the carnage unfold.
translation: Skab episke rumslag mellem flåder af skibe og se ødelæggelserne udfolde sig.

english: You have unlimited resources to build any ship you want
translation: Du har ubegrænsede ressourcer til at bygge ethvert skib du ønsker

english: Build a flight-ready ship in Creative Mode to unlock
translation: Byg et flyveklart skib i Creative Mode for at låse op

english: Embark on a new journey through our story-driven sci-fi episodes
translation: Begiv dig ud på en ny rejse gennem vores historie-drevne sci-fi episoder

english: Your aim is to research and build a stargate to Andromeda
translation: Dit mål er at forske i og bygge en stargate til Andromeda

english: Complete any story episode in 'Boldly Go' to unlock
translation: Fuldfør en vilkårlig historieepisode i 'Boldly Go' for at låse op

english: Stay one step ahead of a devastating anomaly, for as long as you can
translation: Hold dig ét skridt foran en ødelæggende anomali så længe du kan

english: Forge your own path through story driven episodes all around the sector, and take part in the construction of a galactic mega project
translation: Skab din egen vej gennem historie-drevne episoder rundt i sektoren og deltag i opførelsen af et galaktisk megaprojekt

english: Take part in the construction of a galactic megaproject - a STARGATE with enough range to reach our nearest neighbouring galaxy ANDROMEDA
translation: Deltag i opførelsen af et galaktisk megaprojekt - en STARGATE med tilstrækkelig rækkevidde til at nå vores nærmeste nabogalakse ANDROMEDA

english: Stay one step ahead of a devastating anomaly that consumes everything in its path, and save as many as you can before it's too late
translation: Hold dig ét skridt foran en ødelæggende anomali der opsluger alt på sin vej og red så mange du kan før det er for sent

english: Prepare your ship and crew for the upcoming battle!\nUnpausing the game will begin combat.
translation: Forbered dit skib og din besætning til den kommende kamp!\nNår du ophæver pausen i spillet, begynder kampen.

english: OPTIONAL: Use the ship editor to prepare
translation: VALGFRIT: Brug skibseditoren til at forberede dig
Du kan ikke acceptere denne mission

english: We have marked the location of the hostile forces on your map. Good hunting.
translation: Vi har markeret placeringen af de fjendtlige styrker på dit kort. God jagt.

english: All hostile forces have been destroyed. Total payment $*X.
translation: Alle fjendtlige styrker er blevet ødelagt. Samlet betaling $*X.

english: You have located the hostile forces! Destroy them immediately.
translation: Du har lokaliseret de fjendtlige styrker! Ødelæg dem straks.

english: There is a small fleet of hostile ships operating illegally at a nearby star system in this sector.
translation: Der opererer en lille flåde af fjendtlige skibe ulovligt i et nærliggende stjernesystem i denne sektor.

english: They have been harassing trade and humanitarian ships for too long.
translation: De har chikaneret handels- og humanitære skibe alt for længe.

english: Travel to the system, engage them in combat and destroy them.
translation: Rejs til systemet, indled kamp mod dem og ødelæg dem.

english: You have destroyed *X hostiles out of *Y
translation: Du har ødelagt *X fjender ud af *Y

english: The remaining hostile forces have escaped.
translation: De resterende fjendtlige styrker er undsluppet.

english: The hostile ships are located at system S*X.
translation: De fjendtlige skibe befinder sig i system S*X.

english: Pirate forces have created a dangerous minefield in a busy shipping lane.
translation: Piratstyrker har skabt et farligt minefelt i en travl skibsrute.

english: Their aim appears to be to cripple any trade ships that come too close, then rob the stranded ships of valuable cargo.
translation: Deres mål ser ud til at være at lamme handelsskibe der kommer for tæt på og derefter røve de strandede skibe for værdifuld last.

english: Travel to the system and destroy the minefield, before the pirate forces show up.
translation: Rejs til systemet og ødelæg minefeltet før piratstyrkerne dukker op.

english: You will need a weapon system to destroy the mines from a distance.
translation: Du skal bruge et våbensystem til at ødelægge minerne på afstand.

english: Reports suggest there are *X ships in the hostile fleet, hiding out in star system *Y.
translation: Rapporter tyder på at der er *X skibe i den fjendtlige flåde som skjuler sig i stjernesystem *Y.

english: You will require an armed combat vessel to accept this mission.
translation: Du skal bruge et bevæbnet kampfartøj for at acceptere denne mission.

english: Attack and destroy hostile pirate gang
All cargo has been supplied. Good luck.
translation: Al last er leveret. Held og lykke.

english: I've got *X boxes of supplies that need delivering.
translation: Jeg har *X kasser med forsyninger der skal leveres.

english: The destination is *Y Sector Jumps away, in Sector *X.
translation: Destinationen er *Y sektorhop væk i sektor *X.

english: The destination is in this Sector, at Star System S*X.
translation: Destinationen er i denne sektor ved stjernesystem S*X.

english: The remaining *X items of cargo are unaccounted for.
translation: De resterende *X genstande af lasten mangler.

english: It is too late - you will no longer be paid for the remaining cargo.
translation: Det er for sent - du vil ikke længere blive betalt for den resterende last.

english: Received *X out of *Y items. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: Modtaget *X ud af *Y genstande. Samlet betaling $*Z.

english: A shuttle is on route to you now with the supplies.
translation: En shuttle er nu på vej til dig med forsyningerne.

english: These goods are required immediately. You'll have just *X minutes. (+50% pay)
translation: Disse varer er nødvendige straks. Du har kun *X minutter. (+50% betaling) (+50% pay)

english: You have just *X seconds remaining to make the delivery!
translation: Du har kun *X sekunder tilbage til at gennemføre leveringen!

english: Courier mission: Deliver cargo to nearby system
translation: Kureropgave: Lever last til nærliggende system
Lever last til en anden sektor

english: Received *X out of *Y items, but the time limit has now expired.
translation: Modtaget *X ud af *Y genstande men tidsfristen er nu udløbet.

english: A shuttle is on its way to collect the cargo.
translation: En shuttle er på vej for at hente lasten.

english: Some of the cargo has been delivered to the wrong location. You will not be paid.
translation: Noget af lasten er blevet leveret til den forkerte placering. Du vil ikke blive betalt.

english: This mission has been assigned a difficulty rating of *X.
translation: Denne mission har fået en sværhedsgrad på *X.

english: A ship requires each of the following capabilities in order to be certified 'Flight Ready':
translation: Et skib kræver hver af følgende kapaciteter for at blive certificeret som 'Flyveklar':

english: An FTL Drive.  Test your new FTL engine by making a jump to the destination marked on the map.
translation: Et FTL-drev. Test dit nye FTL-drev ved at foretage et hop til destinationen markeret på kortet.

english: Life support to make the interior habitable [*X%]
translation: Livsstøtte til at gøre interiøret beboeligt [*X%]

english: Life support to make the cabin breathable.  Use an Airduct to pressurise the cabin, connected to an Oxygen Loader to supply the air.
translation: Livsstøtte for at gøre kabinen åndbar. Brug en Airduct til at tryksætte kabinen, forbundet til en Oxygen Loader for at levere luften.

english: Test the engines from the TACTICAL screen
A reactor to generate power. Use a Fuel Loader to pipe fuel into the Reactor.
translation: En reaktor til at generere strøm. Brug en Fuel Loader til at lede brændstof ind i reaktoren.

english: Make your new ship ready for flight
translation: Gør dit nye skib klar til flyvning

english: We have marked the location of the fortress on your map. Good luck, Captain.
translation: Vi har markeret fæstningens placering på dit kort. Held og lykke Kaptajn.

english: Hostiles have set up a fortress within the sector. It appears to be where they are fabricating their ships.
translation: Fjender har opført en fæstning i sektoren. Det ser ud til at det er her de fremstiller deres skibe.

english: The fortress is giving them significant power across the sector and must be dealt with.
translation: Fæstningen giver dem betydelig magt i hele sektoren og må håndteres.

english: Travel to the fortress, destroy it, and eliminate any remaining hostiles
translation: Rejs til fæstningen ødelæg den og eliminér alle resterende fjender
Angrebet på fæstningen var en succes.

english: We've marked the asteroid belt location on your map.
translation: Vi har markeret asteroidebæltets placering på dit kort.

english: There is huge demand for FTL fuel cells, to power the evacuation ships.
translation: Der er enorm efterspørgsel efter FTL-brændselsceller, til at drive evakueringsskibene.

english: We can manufacture FTL Fuel, but we need Tilium ore that can only be found in certain asteroid belts.
translation: Vi kan fremstille FTL-brændstof, men vi har brug for Tilium-malm som kun findes i bestemte asteroidebælter.

english: Luckily there is just such an asteroid belt nearby, within this sector, in system S*X.
translation: Heldigvis findes der et passende asteroidebælte i denne sektor i system S*X.

english: The nearest asteroid belt is in the next sector.
translation: Det nærmeste asteroidebælte er i den næste sektor.

english: Then drop the Ore off at any trading post to collect payment.
translation: Aflever derefter malmen ved en hvilken som helst handelsstation for at modtage betaling.

english: You have *X Tilium ore on this ship (We need *Y)
translation: Du har *X Tilium-malm på dette skib (We need *Y)

english: WARNING: There are hostile forces camped out near the asteroid belt. (+50% pay)
translation: ADVARSEL: Der er fjendtlige styrker nær asteroidebæltet. (+50% pay)

english: There is no more Tilium on board your ship.
translation: Der er ikke mere Tilium ombord på dit skib.

english: WARNING: There are reports of a meteor shower in that system. (+50% pay).
translation: ADVARSEL: Der er rapporter om meteorregn i det system. (+50% pay).

english: We have received *X Tilium out of a total of *Y. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: Vi har modtaget *X Tilium ud af i alt *Y. Samlet betaling $*Z.

english: ==> The Tilium must first be refined in a Smelter prior to delivery. <==
translation: ==> Tilium skal først raffineres i et smelteværk før levering. <==

english: Then refine the mined ore in a Smelter.
translation: Raffinér derefter den udvundne malm i et smelteværk.

english: This contract requires a suitable mining vessel, equipped with Mining Lasers and Logistics Drones.
translation: Denne kontrakt kræver et egnet minefartøj, udstyret med minelasere og logistikdroner.

english: Return to a colony or shipyard system to deliver the Tilium.
translation: Vend tilbage til et koloni- eller værftssystem for at levere Tilium.

english: We've dispatched a shuttle to collect the Tilium Ore.
translation: Vi har sendt en shuttle for at hente Tilium-malmen.

english: Travel to the asteroid belt and extract *X Tilium ore.
translation: Rejs til asteroidebæltet og udvind *X Tilium-malm.

english: That's it, all passengers are on board your ship. Travel safe commander.
translation: Det var det, alle passagerer er nu ombord på dit skib. Rejs sikkert, kommandør.

english: *X out of *Y passengers are on board.
There is a group of *X civilians who are looking for safe transit.
translation: Der er en gruppe på *X civile som søger sikker transport.

english: Their destination is *Y Sector Jumps away, in Sector *X.
translation: Deres destination er *Y sektorhop væk i sektor *X.

english: Their destination is in this Sector. Drop them off at Star System S*X.
translation: Deres destination er i denne sektor. Sæt dem af ved stjernesystem S*X.

english: Transport the passengers to the destination
*X passengers did not arrive at the destination safely.
translation: *X passagerer nåede ikke sikkert frem til destinationen.

english: *X passengers out of *Y have made it safely to their destination. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: *X passagerer ud af *Y er ankommet sikkert til deres destination. Samlet betaling $*Z.

english: Your ship will need enough free cabins in your habitation deck.
translation: Dit skib skal have nok ledige kahytter i beboelsesdækket.

english: They are on their way to you now and will dock shortly.
translation: De er på vej til dig nu og vil dokke om kort tid.
Passagerer kræver transport på tværs af sektorer

english: Welcome! We've dispatched a shuttle to collect the passengers.
translation: Velkommen! Vi har sendt en shuttle for at hente passagererne.

english: Passengers have been dropped off at completely the wrong destination! You will not be paid for them.
translation: Passagererne er blevet sat af ved en helt forkert destination! Du vil ikke blive betalt for dem.

english: (The client is offering *Xx more money than usual)
translation: (Klienten tilbyder *Xx mere betaling end normalt) (The client is offering *Xx more money than usual)

english: (The client is offering *X% more money than usual)
translation: (Klienten tilbyder *X% mere betaling end normalt) (The client is offering *X% more money than usual)

english: You have *X stacks of R*Y available for transfer within your fleet (We need *Z)
translation: Du har *X stakke af R*Y tilgængelige til overførsel i din flåde (We need *Z)

english: We have an urgent requirement for *X stacks of R*Y.
translation: Vi har et presserende behov for *X stakke af R*Y.

english: You can choose to manufacture the product from raw materials, or acquire it through some other means.
translation: Du kan vælge at fremstille produktet fra råmaterialer eller skaffe det på anden måde.

english: The market price for these items would be $*X.
translation: Markedsprisen for disse varer ville være $*X.

english: (We are offering *X% above market rate due to urgent requirement).
translation: (Vi tilbyder *X% over markedsprisen på grund af et presserende behov)

english: There is no more R*X available within your fleet.
translation: Der er ikke mere R*X tilgængeligt i din flåde.

english: We have received *X stacks of R*Y out of a total of *Z.
translation: Vi har modtaget *X stakke af R*Y ud af i alt *Z.

english: All of the refugees are on board. We wish you the best of luck, commander.
translation: Alle flygtninge er ombord. Vi ønsker dig held og lykke, kommandør.

english: We have *X civilians living here who have nowhere to go, and no way to escape the void before it arrives.
translation: Vi har *X civile der bor her som ikke har noget sted at tage hen og ingen måde at undslippe tomrummet før det ankommer.

english: Find a place for them in your fleet, look after them, and we will be forever grateful.
translation: Find et sted til dem i din flåde, pas på dem, og vi vil være evigt taknemmelige.

english: *X out of *Y passengers are on board. Total payment $*Z.
translation: *X ud af *Y passagerer er ombord. Samlet betaling $*Z.

english: Your ship will need enough free cabins in your habitation deck.
translation: Dit skib skal have nok ledige kahytter i beboelsesdækket.

english: Take permanent refugees into your care
translation: Tag permanente flygtninge i din varetægt

english: Contract requires at least *X free cabins
You require a Combat Rating of at least *X
translation: Du kræver en kamprating på mindst *X

english: You require a Humanitarian Rating of at least *X
translation: Du kræver en humanitær rating på mindst *X

english: You require an Industry Rating of at least *X
translation: Du kræver en industrirating på mindst *X

english: You require a Logistics Rating of at least *X
translation: Du kræver en logistikrating på mindst *X

english: We've marked the location of the wrecked ship on your map. Please hurry!
translation: Vi har markeret placeringen af det ødelagte skib på dit kort. Skynd dig!

english: All crew have been rescued from the ship! Drop them off at the nearest starbase or colony.
translation: Alle besætningsmedlemmer er reddet fra skibet! Sæt dem af ved den nærmeste stjernebase eller koloni.

english: A ship has become stranded with engine troubles, and the crew need an immediate rescue.
translation: Et skib er strandet med motorproblemer, og besætningen har brug for en øjeblikkelig redning.

english: The damaged ship is nearby in system S*X. Hurry!
translation: Det beskadigede skib befinder sig i system S*X. Skynd dig!

english: The ship is in the next sector.
translation: Skibet er i den næste sektor.

english: There are *X crew on board, and they must be dropped off safely somewhere nearby.
translation: Der er *X besætningsmedlemmer ombord, og de skal sættes sikkert af et sted i nærheden.

english: There are hostile forces in the area. (+50% pay)
translation: Der er fjendtlige styrker i området. (+50% betaling) (+50% pay)

english: There are reports of a meteor shower in the area. (+25% pay).
translation: Der er rapporter om et meteorregn i området. (+25% betaling). (+25% pay)

english: *X crew out of *Y have made it to safety. Total payment due $*Z.
translation: *X besætningsmedlemmer ud af *Y er nået i sikkerhed. Samlet betaling $*Z.

english: You will require at least four manoeuvring thrusters to successfully dock with the damaged ship.
translation: Du skal bruge mindst fire manøvreringsthustere for at kunne dokke med det beskadigede skib.

english: *X crew out of *Y have been rescued and are on board.
translation: *X besætningsmedlemmer ud af *Y er blevet reddet og er ombord.

english: The ship is spinning out of control. It will be very challenging to dock. (+25% pay)
translation: Skibet roterer ukontrolleret. Det vil være meget udfordrende at dokke. (+25% betaling) (+25% pay)

english: The ship is moving - you will need some skill to dock safely. (+25% pay)
translation: Skibet bevæger sig - du skal have en vis færdighed for at dokke sikkert. (+25% betaling) (+25% pay)

english: The ship engines will explode very soon. (+25% pay).
translation: Skibets motorer vil eksplodere meget snart. (+25% betaling). (+25% pay)

english: The ship engine core will explode in just *X seconds!!
translation: Skibets motorkerne vil eksplodere om kun *X sekunder!!
Red civile fra et ødelagt skib

english: Hostile forces have taken up residence within this sector. They are hindering our evacuation efforts and stealing vital resources.
translation: Fjendtlige styrker har slået sig ned i denne sektor. De hindrer vores evakueringsindsats og stjæler vitale ressourcer.

english: We want you to pay a visit to each location marked HOSTILES on the map.
translation: Vi ønsker at du besøger hver placering markeret HOSTILES på kortet.

english: Terminate any enemy vessels you find at those locations.
translation: Eliminér alle fjendtlige fartøjer du finder på disse steder.

english: A payment of $*X will be made after each location is cleared, for a total of $*Y.
translation: En betaling på $*X gives efter hver ryddet placering, i alt $*Y.

english: You have destroyed the enemy forces in system S*X. Payment of $*Y is coming your way.
translation: Du har ødelagt fjendens styrker i system S*X. Betaling på $*Y er på vej.

english: SECTOR OBJECTIVE: Destroy all hostile forces
*X passengers out of *Y have made it safely to their destination. Total payment $*Z.
translation: *X passagerer ud af *Y er ankommet sikkert til deres destination. Samlet betaling $*Z.

english: There are *X civilians stranded in the sector, with no means to escape the coming catastrophe.
translation: Der er *X civile strandet i sektoren uden mulighed for at undslippe den kommende katastrofe.

english: Travel to their star systems and pick them up, and house them temporarily in your fleet.
translation: Rejs til deres stjernesystemer, hent dem og indkvarter dem midlertidigt i din flåde.

english: Transport them safely to the next sector and drop them off at the first starbase to complete the objective.
translation: Transporter dem sikkert til den næste sektor og sæt dem af ved den første stjernebase for at fuldføre målet.

english: *X civilians have been killed during the evacuation.
translation: *X civile er blevet dræbt under evakueringen.

english: Thank you for your efforts commander.
*X passengers did not arrive at the destination safely.
translation: *X passagerer nåede ikke sikkert frem til destinationen.

english: The total payment for rescuing all *X civilians will be $*Y
translation: Den samlede betaling for at redde alle *X civile vil være $*Y

english: *X out of *Y civilians have been collected.
translation: *X ud af *Y civile er blevet samlet op.

english: Your ship will need enough free cabins in your habitation deck.
translation: Dit skib skal have nok ledige kahytter i beboelsesdækket.

english: (You can expand your hab deck at a Shipyard using the Ship Editor)
translation: (Du kan udvide dit beboelsesdæk på et skibsværft ved hjælp af skibseditoren)

english: The Jumpgate is damaged, and must be repaired and re-aligned.
translation: Jumpgate er beskadiget og skal repareres og justeres.

english: The Jumpgate at the end of this sector has some requirements before it can be used.
translation: Jumpgate i slutningen af denne sektor har nogle krav før den kan anvendes.

english: A fleet of hostile ships is attempting to blockade the jumpgate and extort money from ships passing through.
translation: En flåde af fjendtlige skibe forsøger at blokere Jumpgate og afpresse skibe der passerer.

english: You'll need to clear them out before we can safely activate the jumpgate.
translation: Du skal rydde dem af vejen før vi sikkert kan aktivere Jumpgate.

english: We need some maintainence supplies before the jumpgate can be used.
translation: Vi har brug for vedligeholdelsesmaterialer før Jumpgate kan anvendes.

english: The Jumpgate is now ready for use.
translation: Jumpgate er nu klar til brug.

english: Please maneuver all fleet ships into the jumpgate and align for transit.
translation: Manøvrér alle flådeskibe ind i Jumpgate og justér til transit.

english: Thank you, the Jumpgate has been repaired and re-aligned.
translation: Tak Jumpgate er blevet repareret og justeret.

english: There is a TRANSIT FEE to pay for use of the Jumpgate. This money covers the operating costs and energy consumption of such a massive facility.
translation: Der er en TRANSITAFGIFT for at bruge Jumpgate. Denne betaling dækker driftsomkostninger og energiforbrug for et så massivt anlæg.

english: Thank you, payment received for transit.
We've marked the location of the ship on your map. Please hurry!
translation: Vi har markeret skibets position på dit kort. Skynd dig!

english: The vessel is under attack! Fight off the hostile ships before it's too late.
translation: Fartøjet er under angreb! Bekæmp de fjendtlige skibe før det er for sent.

english: Investigate a distress call in system S*X.
translation: Undersøg et nødkald i system S*X.

english: A commercial vessel is under attack from an unknown hostile enemy. They have already taken heavy damage.
translation: Et handelsskib er under angreb fra en ukendt fjendtlig styrke. Det har allerede taget alvorlig skade.

english: Unfortunately the ship has been destroyed.
*X of the *Y enemy ships have been destroyed.
translation: *X af de *Y fjendtlige skibe er blevet ødelagt.

english: To any vessel, we are under attack!  Please help, we won't last much longer!
translation: Til alle fartøjer vi er under angreb! Hjælp os venligst vi holder ikke meget længere!

english: SECTOR OBJECTIVE: Protect ship under attack
We've marked the location of the wrecked ship on your map. Please hurry!
translation: Vi har markeret placeringen af det ødelagte skib på dit kort. Skynd dig!

english: All crew have been rescued from the ship! Drop them off at the nearest starbase or colony.
translation: Alle besætningsmedlemmer er reddet fra skibet! Sæt dem af ved den nærmeste stjernebase eller koloni.

english: Investigate a distress call in system S*X.
translation: Undersøg et nødkald i system S*X.

english: There are hostile forces in the area. (+50% pay)
translation: Der er fjendtlige styrker i området. (+50% betaling) (+50% pay)

english: There are reports of a meteor shower in the area. (+25% pay).
translation: Der er rapporter om meteorregn i området. (+25% betaling). (+25% pay)

english: *X crew out of *Y have made it to safety. Payment owed $*Z.
translation: *X besætningsmedlemmer ud af *Y er nået i sikkerhed. Betaling skyldig $*Z.

english: You will require four manoeuvring thrusters to successfully dock with the damaged ship.
translation: Du skal bruge fire manøvreringsthustere for at kunne dokke med det beskadigede skib.

english: *X crew out of *Y have been rescued and are on board.
translation: *X besætningsmedlemmer ud af *Y er blevet reddet og er ombord.

english: The ship is spinning out of control. It will be very challenging to dock. (+25% pay)
translation: Skibet roterer ukontrolleret. Det vil være meget udfordrende at dokke. (+25% betaling) (+25% pay)

english: The ship is moving - you will need some skill to dock safely. (+25% pay)
translation: Skibet bevæger sig - du skal have en vis færdighed for at dokke sikkert. (+25% betaling) (+25% pay)

english: NB. YOU WILL NEED AT LEAST FOUR THRUSTERS TO MANOEUVRE INTO POSITION.
translation: NB. DU SKAL HAVE MINDST FIRE THRUSTERS FOR AT MANØVRERE I POSITION.

english: The ship engines will explode very soon. (+25% pay).
translation: Skibets motorer vil eksplodere meget snart. (+25% betaling). (+25% pay)

english: The ship engine core will explode in just *X seconds!!
translation: Skibets motorkerne vil eksplodere om kun *X sekunder!!

english: SECTOR OBJECTIVE: Rescue civilians from wrecked ship
translation: SEKTORMÅL: Red civile fra et ødelagt skib

english: Excellent. We are sending a shuttle to you now.
translation: Fremragende. Vi sender en shuttle til dig nu.

english: Thank you very much for helping us with these unique creatures. If I'm honest, we have struggled to find a captain who was willing to undertake this mission.
translation: Tak fordi du hjælper os med disse unikke væsner. Hvis jeg skal være ærlig, har vi haft svært ved at finde en kaptajn, der var villig til at påtage sig denne mission.

english: We have left you with a litter of eight female Tiddlets, along with some comfortable crates for them to sleep in.
translation: Vi har efterladt dig med et kuld på otte hun-Tiddlets samt nogle komfortable kasser, som de kan sove i.

english: Please take very good care of them!
We have received all of your Tiddlets. Thank you so much!
translation: Vi har modtaget alle dine Tiddlets. Tusind tak!

english: Now, there is one crucial detail you must adhere to, in order to safely transport these Tiddlets.
translation: Nu er der én afgørende detalje, du skal overholde for at transportere disse Tiddlets sikkert.

english: They can survive up to *X seconds in hyperspace safely, but anything beyond that risks them dying of shock.
translation: De kan overleve op til *X sekunder i hyperspace uden problemer, men alt derudover risikerer at få dem til at dø af chok.

english: There are now *X dead tiddlets on board
translation: Der er nu *X døde tiddlets ombord

english: We need a transport vessel to ferry a litter of lovable, rare live animals to a sanctuary, many jumps away.
translation: Vi har brug for et transportfartøj til at fragte et kuld elskelige, sjældne levende dyr til et reservat mange hop væk.

english: The animals aren't dangerous, but they do have some special requirements that must be closely followed or they will not survive the journey.
translation: Dyrene er ikke farlige, men de har nogle særlige krav, som skal følges nøje, ellers overlever de ikke rejsen.

english: We will pay $*X if the entire litter is delivered safely.
translation: Vi betaler $*X, hvis hele kuldet leveres sikkert.

english: Since you delivered an entirely new litter to us, we thought it only fair to reward you with a gift.
translation: Da du leverede et helt nyt kuld til os, mente vi, at det kun var rimeligt at belønne dig med en gave.

english: We have sent you a couple of prototype Long Range Hyperspace Sensors. They are much more sensitive than the standard model. We hope you find them useful.
translation: Vi har sendt dig et par prototype Long Range Hyperspace-sensorer. De er meget mere følsomme end standardmodellen. Vi håber, du får glæde af dem.

english: We have now received an additional *X Tiddlets!
translation: Vi har nu modtaget yderligere *X Tiddlets!

english: If you'd like to help (and earn a lot of credits) please find our job in the CONTRACTS list.
translation: Hvis du vil hjælpe (og tjene mange credits), så find vores job i CONTRACTS-listen.

english: We have safely received *X out of 8 Tiddlets - Payment due $*Y
translation: Vi har sikkert modtaget *X ud af 8 Tiddlets - Betaling forfalder $*Y

english: Oh my goodness! We were certain all 8 were female, but clearly we made a mistake.
translation: Åh du godeste! Vi var sikre på, at alle 8 var hunner, men tydeligvis tog vi fejl.

english: We would suggest you separate them, but tiddlets reproduce telepathically, and only ever during hyperspace travel.
translation: Vi vil foreslå, at du adskiller dem, men tiddlets formerer sig telepatisk, og kun under hyperspace-rejser.

english: Oh my goodness!! There are so many of them!
translation: Åh du godeste!! Der er så mange af dem!

english: Well, thank you very much. With this many Tiddlets we can begin farming these delicious creatures immediately.
translation: Nå, mange tak. Med så mange Tiddlets kan vi begynde at opdrætte disse lækre væsner med det samme.

english: We are willing to pay a very generous price to any individual who can supply us with one or more Tiddlets.
translation: Vi er villige til at betale en meget generøs pris til enhver, der kan levere en eller flere Tiddlets.

english: We are offering you $*Y for all *X of your Tiddlets.
translation: Vi tilbyder dig $*Y for alle *X af dine Tiddlets.

english: We've heard a rumour you might have some rare, valuable life-forms on board.
translation: Vi har hørt et rygte om, at du måske har nogle sjældne, værdifulde livsformer ombord.

english: We have received *X Tiddlets. Total payment due $*Y.
translation: Vi har modtaget *X Tiddlets. Samlet betaling: $*Y.

english: Hostile ships will only target you once you have targeted them first.
translation: Fjendtlige skibe vil kun angribe dig når du først har målrettet dem.

english: We hope you enjoyed playing the demo of The Last Starship. Your journey has just begun!  Unlock the full game to explore more Story Episodes, Survival Mode, Arena Mode, a full Ship Editor and more!
translation: Vi håber du nød at spille demoen af The Last Starship. Din rejse er kun lige begyndt! Lås det fulde spil op for at udforske flere historieepisoder Survival Mode Arena Mode en fuld Ship Editor og meget mere!

english: The game will be saved to Steam Cloud when enabled. A warning will show if the save fails.
translation: Spillet vil blive gemt i Steam Cloud, når det er aktiveret. En advarsel vises, hvis gemningen mislykkes.

english: You will need to turn your ships into a long term self sufficient fleet.
translation: Du bliver nødt til at omdanne dine skibe til en langsigtet selvforsynende flåde.

english: Bring as many people with you as you can, and don't look back.
translation: Tag så mange mennesker med dig som du kan og se dig ikke tilbage.

english: You currently have *X residents within your fleet.
translation: Du har i øjeblikket *X beboere i din flåde.

english: It's possible we won't ever be able to stop the void collapse anomaly.
translation: Det er muligt at vi aldrig vil kunne stoppe void collapse anomalien.

english: It may just keep expanding forever. There may be nowhere safe for us to stop.
translation: Den kan måske bare fortsætte med at udvide sig for evigt. Der er måske ingen steder hvor vi kan være sikre.

english: In which case we need to get used to living on self sufficient ships, indefinitely.
translation: I så fald må vi vænne os til at leve på selvforsynende skibe på ubestemt tid.

english: Next bonus when population reaches *X residents - $*Y.
translation: Næste bonus når befolkningen når *X beboere - $*Y.

english: Population has reached *X residents. Funding bonus $*Y.
Your highest population was *X residents within your fleet.
translation: Din højeste befolkning var *X beboere i din flåde.

english: Pumps oxygen into the surrounding cabin until a breathable atmosphere is achieved. Must be supplied with Oxygen through a pipe.
translation: Pumper ilt ind i den omkringliggende kabine indtil en åndbar atmosfære er opnået. Skal forsynes med ilt gennem et rør.

english: Stores any excess power available in the powergrid, up to 1000MJ. The battery will supply power whenever there is a shortage.
translation: Lagrer overskydende strøm i elnettet op til 1000MJ. Batteriet leverer strøm, når der er underskud.

english: Broken hop drive, capable of hopping within systems
translation: Ødelagt hop-drev, der kan hoppe inden for systemer

english: A box of ammo for a Gatling Gun (PDC).
translation: En kasse ammunition til en Gatling Gun (PDC).

english: A medium range weapon system that launches a barrage of explosive shells at the target. Cannon shells are excellent at dealing area-of-effect damage to an enemy ship, and will shred hull armour.
translation: Et mellemdistance våbensystem der affyrer en salve af eksplosive granater mod målet. Kanongranater er meget effektive til områdeskade mod et fjendtligt skib og kan flænse skrogbeskyttelsen.

english: A complex piece of scientific equipment.  Can combine multiple different chemical inputs (liquids, gases and solids) into different outputs. The user can cycle the active 'recipe' by clicking on it.
translation: Et komplekst stykke videnskabeligt udstyr. Kan kombinere flere forskellige kemiske input (væsker, gasser og faste stoffer) til forskellige output. Brugeren kan skifte den aktive 'opskrift' ved at klikke på den.

english: Laser infuser, infuses objects with energy. No tiddlets were harmed in the making of this equipment.
translation: Laserinfuseren infuserer genstande med energi. Ingen tiddlets tog skade under fremstillingen af dette udstyr.

english: A defensive system that uses a deflector beam to divert incoming rocket shells
translation: Et defensivt system der bruger en deflektorstråle til at aflede indkommende raketgranater

english: Provides an access point to the ship so that shuttle craft can dock and undock.
translation: Giver et adgangspunkt til skibet så shuttlefartøjer kan docke og afdocke.

english: A heavy pressure door that can be used to seal off areas in the event of a hull breach or fire.
translation: En tung trykdør som kan bruges til at forsegle områder i tilfælde af skroggennembrud eller brand.

english: This equipment is required to launch Logistics Drones from your ship. Drones can gather resources and salvage from space, then bring it back to the ship through the Drone Bay. One Drone Bay can launch multiple Drones.
translation: Dette udstyr er nødvendigt for at opsende logistikdroner fra dit skib. Droner kan indsamle ressourcer og vragdele fra rummet og derefter bringe det tilbage til skibet gennem dronehangaren. Én dronehangar kan opsende flere droner.

english: A large piece of equipment, capable of transmitting up to 200MW to the Stargate.
translation: Et stort stykke udstyr der kan overføre op til 200MW til Stargate.

english: The ship's main source of forward thrust.  Must be supplied with Fuel (via a pipe) and Power (via a cable).
translation: Skibets primære fremdriftskilde. Skal forsynes med Brændstof (via et rør) og Strøm (via et kabel). (via a pipe) (via a cable)

english: Takes a canister of Fuel, and pumps it into an underfloor pipe. Use pipes to connect this to your Reactor and your Engines.
translation: Tager en beholder med brændstof og pumper det ind i et rør under gulvet. Brug rør til at forbinde dette med din reaktor og dine motorer.

english: Uses nuclear fusion of Deuterium to generate large amounts of energy. However the fusion reactor must be 'powered up' with a huge amount of energy before it will generate any power itself.\n\nGenerates a maximum power output of 500MW.
translation: Bruger nuklear fusion af deuterium til at generere store mængder energi. Fusionsreaktoren skal dog først 'opstartes' med en enorm mængde energi før den selv kan producere strøm.\n\nGenererer en maksimal effekt på 500MW.

english: A large exterior vent that sucks in gases from space. Many gases found in nebulas can be used to produce useful resources like Fuel, FTL charges, and explosives.
translation: En stor udvendig ventil, der suger gasser ind fra rummet. Mange gasser, der findes i tåger, kan bruges til at producere nyttige ressourcer som brændstof, FTL-ladninger og sprængstoffer.

english: A close range rapid-fire weapon system, primarily designed for defense against incoming fighters and ordnance.  The gatling gun excels at destroying fast-moving targets at close range, but lacks the punch to penetrate armoured targets.
translation: Et kortdistance hurtigskydende våbensystem primært designet til forsvar mod indkommende jagerfly og ammunition. Gatlingkanonen er fremragende til at ødelægge hurtigt bevægende mål på kort afstand men mangler kraft til at trænge igennem pansrede mål.

english: An enclosed greenhouse device that can be used to grow crops, in order to feed your crew.  Requires compost and water, and Seeds to get things started.
translation: Et lukket drivhusanlæg, der kan bruges til at dyrke afgrøder for at brødføde din besætning. Kræver kompost og vand samt frø for at komme i gang.

english: The Hyperspace Scoop sits at the front of a starship and faces the direction of travel. During hyperspace a strong magnetic field is projected forward, drawing in large volumes of interstellar matter. The isotopes gathered this way can be refined into FTL Fuel.
translation: Hyperspace-opsamleren sidder forrest på et stjerneskib og vender i rejseretningen. Under hyperspace projiceres et stærkt magnetfelt fremad, som trækker store mængder interstellart stof ind. De isotoper, der indsamles på denne måde, kan raffineres til FTL-brændstof.

english: A Long Range and extremely sensitive prototype version of the standard hyperspace sensor.
translation: En langtrækkende og ekstremt følsom prototypeversion af den standard hyperrumssensor.

english: Grinds giant lumps of ice into small pieces, then warms the ice until it melts into liquid. The resulting water must be filtered before it is safe to drink.
translation: Kværner store isklumper til små stykker og opvarmer derefter isen, indtil den smelter til væske. Det resulterende vand skal filtreres, før det er sikkert at drikke.

english: These are installed in the exterior wall of your ship, reducing the damaging effects of lightning and providing more control over where the lightning strikes. They cannot be repaired, but they will queue the installation of their replacement, when destroyed by lightning.
translation: Disse installeres i skibets ydre væg og reducerer lynets skadelige effekt samt giver bedre kontrol over hvor lynet slår ned. De kan ikke repareres men vil automatisk sætte installationen af en erstatning i kø når de ødelægges af lyn.

english: This is a general purpose version of the Fuel Loader and Oxygen Loader, and can take any liquid or gas canister.  Known to heavily confuse new captains.  Use pipes to connect the Loader to other equipment.
translation: Dette er en universel version af brændstofladeren og iltladeren og kan tage enhver væske- eller gasbeholder. Kendt for at forvirre nye kaptajner. Brug rør til at forbinde laderen med andet udstyr.

english: An incredibly useful semi-intelligent robot, capable of gathering salvage from deep space. Can also perform minor repairs to a damaged hull. Must be launched from a Drone Bay.
translation: En utrolig nyttig semi-intelligent robot som kan indsamle vragdele fra det dybe rum. Kan også udføre mindre reparationer på et beskadiget skrog. Skal opsendes fra en dronehangar.

english: Can drill into mineral patches (found in asteroid belts) to extract valuable minerals.
translation: Kan bore i mineralfelter (findes i asteroidebælter) for at udvinde værdifulde mineraler. (found in asteroid belts)

english: A workbench where a skilled crew member can fabricate different forms of ammunition for ship weapon systems. Uses metal and explosives to produce Bullets, Railgun Slugs, Cannon Shells etc.
translation: En arbejdsbænk hvor et dygtigt besætningsmedlem kan fremstille forskellige typer ammunition til skibets våbensystemer. Bruger metal og sprængstoffer til at producere kugler, railgun-projektiler, kanongranater osv.

english: Takes a pressurised canister of oxygen and pumps it into an underfloor pipe.  Use pipes to connect this to your Airduct, to supply oxygen to the cabin.
translation: Tager en tryksat beholder med ilt og pumper den ind i et rør under gulvet. Brug rør til at forbinde dette med din luftkanal for at forsyne kabinen med ilt.

english: Uses electrical power to extract Oxygen from Water.
translation: Bruger elektrisk strøm til at udvinde ilt fra vand.

english: Radiation blocker, significantly reduces all radiation passing through it. Place between your crew and equipment that emit radiation.
translation: Strålingsblokker reducerer markant al stråling der passerer igennem den. Placér den mellem din besætning og udstyr der udsender stråling.

english: Emits radiation. For testing new radiation mechanic (has no gameplay use).
translation: Udsender stråling. Til test af den nye strålingsmekanik (har ingen gameplay-funktion). (has no gameplay use)

english: An extremely accurate and long range weapon system that fires a solid slug of metal. The Railgun is a precise weapon that can penetrate through hull armour and destroy equipment inside the target ship. However, the weapon draws a huge amount of energy to recharge after each shot.
translation: Et ekstremt præcist våbensystem med lang rækkevidde som affyrer et massivt metalprojektil. Railgunen er et præcisionsvåben som kan trænge gennem skrogbeskyttelse og ødelægge udstyr inde i målfartøjet. Våbnet kræver dog en enorm mængde energi til genopladning efter hvert skud.

english: A box of ammo for a Railgun.
translation: En kasse ammunition til en Railgun.

english: Burns high-energy Fuel to produce power. Must be supplied with Fuel (via a pipe). Then use cables to connect to other powered equipment.\n\nGenerates a maximum power output of 100MW.
translation: Forbrænder højenergibrændstof for at producere strøm. Skal forsynes med brændstof (via et rør). Brug derefter kabler til at forbinde til andet udstyr.\n\nGenererer maksimalt 100MW strøm. (via a pipe)

english: An automatic industrial machine for refining raw chemicals and gases.
translation: En automatisk industrimaskine til raffinering af rå kemikalier og gasser.

english: The local shipyard can repair the heavy structural damage on your ship, for a price.
translation: Det lokale skibsværft kan reparere de alvorlige strukturelle skader på dit skib mod betaling.

english: This processor chip contains information that can be used to boost our current research or improve the efficiency of our equipment.
translation: Denne processorchip indeholder information som kan bruges til at forbedre vores nuværende forskning eller øge effektiviteten af vores udstyr.

english: A workstation for a scientist to conduct valuable research.
translation: En arbejdsstation hvor en forsker kan udføre værdifuld forskning.

english: A small bag of mixed vegetable seeds, that you might be able to grow in a Hydroponic Garden.
translation: En lille pose blandede grøntsagsfrø, som du måske kan dyrke i en hydroponisk have.

english: Takes sewage from the habitation deck, separates the solid and liquid waste, and partially recycles them. The device outputs dirty water and compost.
translation: Tager kloakvand fra beboelsesdækket, adskiller fast og flydende affald og genanvender det delvist. Enheden producerer beskidt vand og kompost.

english: This pipe extracts sewage from the habitation deck above. You can then pipe the sewage into a storage tank and (eventually) reprocess it back into water.  The Pipe MUST BE DIRECTLY UNDER THE HABITATION DECK to function.
translation: Dette rør udtrækker spildevand fra beboelsesdækket ovenover. Du kan derefter føre spildevandet ind i en lagertank og (senere) genbehandle det til vand igen. Røret SKAL VÆRE DIREKTE UNDER BEBOELSESDÆKKET for at fungere. (eventually)

english: Small storage crate, stores a single type of resource but at 4x the usual amount per square
translation: Lille opbevaringskasse, lagrer én type ressource, men i 4x den normale mængde pr. felt

english: A storage tank that can store liquids and gases.
translation: En lagertank der kan lagre væsker og gasser.

english: This industrial processing machine can melt ores into usable metal ingots. Once installed, click on it to change the ore type.
translation: Dette industrielle forarbejdningsanlæg kan smelte malm til brugbare metalbarrer. Når det er installeret, skal du klikke på det for at ændre malmtypen.

english: These must be installed outside your ship, with scaffolding for support. Each panel generates 10MW.
translation: Disse skal installeres uden på dit skib med stillads til støtte. Hvert panel genererer 10MW.

english: A storage place for spacesuits that need their oxygen replenishing.
translation: Et opbevaringssted for rumdragter der skal have genopfyldt deres ilt.

english: Crew and passengers can only access the upper habitation deck with a ladder.
translation: Besætning og passagerer kan kun få adgang til det øverste beboelsesdæk via en stige.

english: Storage crate, stores a single type of resource but at 4x the usual amount per square
translation: Opbevaringskasse, lagrer én type ressource, men i 4x den normale mængde pr. felt

english: A powerful computer for number crunching and simulating important research.
translation: En kraftfuld computer til tung beregning og simulering af vigtig forskning.

english: A massive tank that can store a great deal of liquid or gas.
translation: En massiv tank der kan lagre en stor mængde væske eller gas.

english: A sensor capable of detecting telepathic waves.
translation: En sensor der kan registrere telepatiske bølger.

english: Maneuvering thruster. Must be attached to the wall of the ship. Provides thrust to permit lateral and rotational movement.
translation: Manøvreringsthruster. Skal være fastgjort til skibets væg. Giver fremdrift til lateral og roterende bevægelse.

english: A storage tank that can store liquids and gases.
translation: En lagertank der kan lagre væsker og gasser.

english: Takes dirty water from sewage recycling or from naturally occurring ice - and purifies it into safe drinkable water.
translation: Tager beskidt vand fra kloakgenbrug eller fra naturligt forekommende is - og renser det til sikkert drikkevand.

english: A terminal where a Weapons Officer can control multiple weapons at the same time.
translation: En terminal hvor en våbenofficer kan kontrollere flere våben samtidig.

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: Det er det 23. århundrede. Menneskeheden har koloniseret stjernerne.

english: Millions of people now live off world, sometimes hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: Millioner af mennesker lever nu uden for Jorden, nogle gange hundreder af lysår fra Jorden.

english: Word has reached Earth from one such colony. A dark anomaly has been seen, and cannot be explained.
translation: Der er nået besked til Jorden fra en sådan koloni. En mørk anomali er blevet observeret og kan ikke forklares.

english: Where once there was a star, now there is nothing but a black void, slowly expanding.
translation: Hvor der engang var en stjerne, er der nu intet andet end et sort tomrum, som langsomt udvider sig.

english: Those who live nearby call it THE COLLAPSE, and believe it will eventually consume the entire galaxy.
translation: Dem der bor i nærheden kalder det THE COLLAPSE og tror, at det til sidst vil opsluge hele galaksen.

english: Nevertheless, Earth has dispatched you and your crew in the science vessel PRAXIS to investigate.
translation: Ikke desto mindre har Jorden sendt dig og din besætning i forskningsfartøjet PRAXIS for at undersøge sagen.

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: Det er det 23. århundrede. Menneskeheden har koloniseret stjernerne.

english: Millions of people now live off world, sometimes hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: Millioner af mennesker lever nu uden for Jorden, nogle gange hundreder af lysår fra Jorden.

english: Word has reached Earth from a distant science station. A dark anomaly has been detected, and cannot be explained.
translation: Der er nået besked til Jorden fra en fjern forskningsstation. En mørk anomali er blevet opdaget og kan ikke forklares.

english: Where once there was a star, now there is nothing but a black void, endlessly expanding and consuming everything in its path.
