translation: Hvor der engang var en stjerne, er der nu intet andet end et sort tomrum, der uendeligt udvider sig og opsluger alt på sin vej.

english: There is only one glimmer of hope. A STARGATE project, unfinished and unproven, offers an escape route to a distant Galaxy.
translation: Der er kun ét håb. Et STARGATE-projekt, ufærdigt og uprøvet, tilbyder en flugtrute til en fjern galakse.

english: But the scale of the catastrophe is almost too big to comprehend. Only a few will survive.
translation: Men katastrofens omfang er næsten for stort til at fatte. Kun få vil overleve.

english: With a new ship and a new crew, you commit yourself to reaching the STARGATE with as many people as you can, before it's too late.
translation: Med et nyt skib og en ny besætning forpligter du dig til at nå STARGATE med så mange mennesker som muligt, før det er for sent.

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: Det er det 23. århundrede. Menneskeheden har koloniseret stjernerne.

english: Millions of people now live off world, sometimes hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: Millioner af mennesker lever nu uden for Jorden, nogle gange hundreder af lysår fra Jorden.

english: The era of massive industrialisation of space has begun, feeding an insatiable desire for energy and metal.
translation: Æraen med massiv industrialisering af rummet er begyndt og nærer en umættelig efterspørgsel efter energi og metal.

english: Powerful businesses control vast swathes of space, backed by untold reserves of wealth.
translation: Mægtige virksomheder kontrollerer enorme områder af rummet, understøttet af enorme reserver af rigdom.

english: The CEO of one such company - the INTERSTELLAR MINING CORPORATION - has challenged humanity to build a stargate so powerful it can reach our nearest Galaxy.
translation: Direktøren for en sådan virksomhed - INTERSTELLAR MINING CORPORATION - har udfordret menneskeheden til at bygge en stargate så kraftig, at den kan nå vores nærmeste galakse.

english: Trillions of dollars in funding have been set aside.
translation: Billioner af dollars i finansiering er blevet afsat.

english: The time is perfect for a small entrepreneurial and industrious team of miners to start a new career - and make their fortune in the stars.
translation: Tiden er perfekt for et lille entreprenant og flittigt hold af minearbejdere til at starte en ny karriere - og skabe deres formue blandt stjernerne.

english: It is the 23rd century.  Humanity has colonised the stars.
translation: Det er det 23. århundrede. Menneskeheden har koloniseret stjernerne.

english: Millions now thrive on distant worlds, living hundreds of light years from Earth.
translation: Millioner trives nu på fjerne planeter og lever hundredvis af lysår fra Jorden.

english: As space becomes the new frontier, an era of unprecedented exploration and expansion unfolds.
translation: I takt med at rummet bliver den nye grænse, udfolder en æra med hidtil uset udforskning og ekspansion sig.

english: Powerful corporations dominate entire regions, but beyond their reach lies uncharted territory, filled with untold mysteries and boundless opportunities.
translation: Magtfulde virksomheder dominerer hele regioner, men uden for deres rækkevidde ligger ukendt territorium, fyldt med ufortalte mysterier og ubegrænsede muligheder.

english: The CEO of the INTERSTELLAR MINING CORPORATION has issued a daring challenge: build a stargate powerful enough to reach our nearest galaxy.
translation: Administrerende direktør for INTERSTELLAR MINING CORPORATION har udstedt en dristig udfordring: byg en stjerneport, der er kraftig nok til at nå vores nærmeste galakse.

english: With trillions in funding up for grabs, the stage is set for fearless adventurers to forge their own path in the cosmos.
translation: Med billioner i finansiering til rådighed er scenen sat for frygtløse eventyrere til at skabe deres egen vej i kosmos.

english: Will you rise to the challenge, and chart your own course among the stars?
translation: Vil du tage udfordringen op og kortlægge din egen kurs blandt stjernerne ?

english: Install some Batteries to store reserve power from your Reactor.
translation: Installer nogle batterier for at lagre reserveenergi fra din reaktor.

english: Your ship cannot generate enough power. Consider installing more Reactors.
translation: Dit skib kan ikke generere nok strøm. Overvej at installere flere reaktorer.

english: Load into a Science Station for analysis
translation: Indlæs i en forskningsstation til analyse

english: The ship's computer is coming online now.
translation: Skibets computer begynder nu at komme online.

english: We should be able to get some answers. Have your crew start a data transfer so we can get the flight logs.
translation: Vi burde kunne få nogle svar. Få din besætning til at starte en dataoverførsel, så vi kan få flyjournalerne.

english: The nebula is so thick, it's blocking visibility. But we are detecting something on the sensors. They're here somewhere.
translation: Nebulaen er så tæt, at den blokerer for udsynet. Men vi registrerer noget på sensorerne. De er et sted her.

english: You'll have to do a sweep of the area. Take it slow, and use the sensor view in TACTICAL to try to find the ship.
translation: Du bliver nødt til at gennemsøge området. Tag det roligt, og brug sensorvisningen i TACTICAL for at prøve at finde skibet.
Bliv ved med at lede, kaptajn.

english: More wreckage. More bodies.  The ship must be somewhere nearby.
translation: Mere vrag. Flere lig. Skibet må være et sted i nærheden.

english: The ship didn't even manage to activate its Flight Recorder.  We must investigate.
translation: Skibet nåede ikke engang at aktivere sin flyoptager. Vi må undersøge det.

english: The Docking Port is still operational.  Dock your ship with the Celestial Hammer, and take a team on-board to look for survivors.
translation: Dokningsporten fungerer stadig. Dok dit skib med Celestial Hammer, og tag et hold ombord for at lede efter overlevende.

english: Could it have been some sort of catastrophic accident?
translation: Kunne det have været en form for katastrofal ulykke?

english: Your crew will repair the reactors and power up the ship. Once they're done, bring the ship back to spacedock. I need to do a proper forensic investigation.
translation: Din besætning vil reparere reaktorerne og starte skibet op. Når de er færdige, bring skibet tilbage til rumdok. Jeg har brug for at foretage en ordentlig retsmedicinsk undersøgelse.

english: Transfer the ship to a Shipyard for analysis
translation: Overfør skibet til et skibsværft til analyse

english: Captain, I need your help once again. One of my ships has gone missing out on a routine patrol. I fear the worst. I want you to find the ship, and bring her home.
translation: Kaptajn, jeg har brug for din hjælp igen. Et af mine skibe er forsvundet under en rutinepatrulje. Jeg frygter det værste. Jeg vil have, at du finder skibet og bringer det hjem.

english: Thank you Captain. It's good to work with you once again, although I wish it was under better circumstances.
translation: Tak, kaptajn. Det er godt at arbejde sammen med dig igen, selvom jeg ville ønske, det var under bedre omstændigheder.

english: The ship in question is the Celestial Hammer. She was a major player in the battle against that cloaked pirate vessel. I lost contact with her a couple of days ago.
translation: Det skib, det drejer sig om, er Celestial Hammer. Hun spillede en vigtig rolle i kampen mod det skjulte piratfartøj. Jeg mistede kontakten med hende for et par dage siden.

english: The ship is heavily armed. If there is foul play at hand, well, I strongly advise you prepare for a fight.
translation: Skibet er tungt bevæbnet. Hvis der er underligheder på spil, vil jeg stærkt anbefale, at du forbereder dig på kamp.

english: Help Cmdr Harken recover their ship
translation: Hjælp kommandør Harken med at få deres skib tilbage

english: This save is likely to be overwritten by the game as you continue playing, so you should create a manual save if you haven't already done so using the "SAVE GAME" option.\n\nThis warning can be disabled in the settings menu.
translation: Denne gemning bliver sandsynligvis overskrevet af spillet når du fortsætter med at spille så du bør oprette en manuel gemning hvis du ikke allerede har gjort det via "GEM SPIL"-valgmuligheden.\n\nDenne advarsel kan deaktiveres i indstillingsmenuen.

english: The game failed to save to the cloud, the game has been saved locally instead.\n\nPlease check that you have enough storage in the Steam Cloud and try again.
translation: Spillet kunne ikke gemme i skyen og er i stedet blevet gemt lokalt.\n\nKontrollér at du har nok lagerplads i Steam Cloud og prøv igen.

english: Due to incompatible changes in this version, your progress in active episodes will be reset.
translation: På grund af inkompatible ændringer i denne version vil din fremdrift i aktive episoder blive nulstillet.

english: Due to new phases or storylines surrounding the stargate, your stargate progress has been reset.
translation: På grund af nye faser eller historielinjer omkring Stargate er din Stargate-fremdrift blevet nulstillet.

english: You have loaded a game with a future save format, you may experience that some parts of the game do not work correctly
translation: Du har indlæst et spil med et fremtidigt gemmeformat. Du kan opleve at nogle dele af spillet ikke fungerer korrekt.

english: A huge community fuselage built by Zion - perfect for any career the Captain desires. The ship benefits from a huge cabin capacity, but is very slow and heavy.
translation: En enorm fællesskabsfuselage bygget af Zion - perfekt som hangarskib eller fregat.

english: A truly massive ship designed with heavy industry, science and logistics in mind.  Big, slow, and heavy - requiring a massive power grid and engine array.
translation: Et virkelig massivt skib designet til tung industri og store operationer.

english: The Stargate Project demands your help! Industry and Automation take centre stage as you manufacture parts for a megaproject stargate to the Andromeda Galaxy.
translation: Stargate-projektet har brug for din hjælp! Industrien kalder på dine evner.

english: Another large vessel well suited to combat and dangerous operations.  The forward hull is encased in heavy armour, making the ship much tougher, but also slower and less maneuverable.
translation: Et andet stort fartøj velegnet til kamp og støtte.

english: A modular and easily expanded ship design, ideal for interstellar logistics and mining operations. With cabin space for over 50 crew or passengers.
translation: Et modulært og let udvideligt skibsdesign ideelt til logistik.

english: A tiny and fast science vessel with all necessary equipment for interstellar adventure, and provisioned with enough supplies for a small crew.
translation: Et lille og hurtigt forskningsfartøj med alt det nødvendige udstyr.

english: A community ship built by Orion Industries - a perfect balance of form and function. Decent cabin space and room for equipment, but small and light enough to be fast and nimble.
translation: Et fællesskabsskib bygget af Orion Industries - et alsidigt og pålideligt fartøj.

english: The absolute minimum ship fuselage, but you are docked at a fully operational Shipyard with a generous starting budget to build whatever ship you want from scratch.
translation: Den absolut minimale skibsfuselage, men du er fri til at bygge videre fra bunden.

english: A more complex setup. A large and capable ship with plenty of room for upgrades, but with a heavier and slower hull.
translation: Et mere komplekst setup. Et stort og kapabelt skib.

english: We've designed a custom sensor package that will give us the information we need.
translation: Vi har designet en specialsensorpakke som vil give os de oplysninger vi har brug for.

english: A shuttle is on its way now with two of these sensors.
translation: En shuttle er på vej nu med to af disse sensorer.

english: You have captured *X Data from the anomaly.
translation: Du har indsamlet *X data fra anomalien.

english: We need more data so we can understand what this anomaly is.
translation: Vi har brug for flere data så vi kan forstå hvad denne anomali er.

english: And we can't possibly stop the anomaly until we understand it.
translation: Og vi kan umuligt stoppe anomalien før vi forstår den.

english: If you can gather enough science data for us, we think there's a good chance we can design a way to counteract the anomaly.
translation: Hvis du kan indsamle nok videnskabsdata til os, tror vi der er en god chance for at vi kan udvikle en metode til at modvirke anomalien.

english: We can send you research funding as you collect data. Capture 10 data from the Anomaly and we'll send the first funding grant.
translation: Vi kan sende dig forskningsmidler mens du indsamler data. Indsaml 10 data fra anomalien og vi sender det første tilskud.

english: Install the sensors on your ship (*X/2)
Ensure the sensors are powered and operational
translation: Sørg for at sensorerne er tændt og fungerer

english: We've received your preliminary sensor data. Fascinating! It looks like the anomaly is expanding, and the rate of expansion is increasing.
translation: Vi har modtaget dine foreløbige sensordata. Fascinerende! Det ser ud til at anomalien udvider sig, og udvidelseshastigheden stiger.

english: We've just paid you a science grant of $10,000. Capture 100 data to unlock more funding. The closer you fly to the anomaly, the faster the sensors collect data.
translation: Vi har netop betalt dig et videnskabstilskud på $10,000. Indsaml 100 data for at låse op for mere finansiering. Jo tættere du flyver på anomalien, desto hurtigere indsamler sensorerne data.

english: We've now received 100 science packets from your sensors, thank you. This is invaluable data for us.
translation: Vi har nu modtaget 100 videnskabspakker fra dine sensorer, tak. Dette er uvurderlige data for os.

english: We've just sent you another $100,000.  The next bonus will be $1 Million for 1000 sensor data.  You can buy more hyperspace sensors at starbases and colonies.
translation: Vi har netop sendt dig yderligere $100,000. Den næste bonus vil være $1 Million for 1000 sensordata. Du kan købe flere hyperspace-sensorer ved stjernebaser og kolonier.

english: Your sensors have now captured 1000 data from the anomaly. We have our best minds working on a solution and your data has been invaluable.
translation: Dine sensorer har nu indsamlet 1000 data fra anomalien. Vores bedste eksperter arbejder på en løsning, og dine data har været uvurderlige.

english: We're sending a $1M science grant to you now.  Keep doing what you're doing! More funding will be unlocked at 10,000 science data.
translation: Vi sender et $1M videnskabstilskud til dig nu. Fortsæt det gode arbejde! Mere finansiering låses op ved 10,000 videnskabsdata.

english: Both sensors are on board your ship. You need to install them.
translation: Begge sensorer er nu ombord på dit skib. Du skal installere dem.

english: These sensors will collect data from the anomaly while you are in Hyperspace.
translation: Disse sensorer vil indsamle data fra anomalien mens du er i hyperspace.

english: The closer you can hyperjump to the anomaly, the faster they will collect data.
translation: Jo tættere du kan hyperspringe på anomalien, desto hurtigere indsamler de data.

english: When searching in lists, ignore accented characters, e.g. "é" will match "e"
translation: Når du søger i lister ignoreres accenttegn f.eks. vil "é" matche "e"

english:
We need to collect usage data to help us to better understand how people are playing and to help us to improve the game. 

We do not collect any personally identifiable information.

To find out more visit Legal Information (bottom of the screen)
translation:
Vi er nødt til at indsamle brugsdata for bedre at forstå hvordan spillet bliver spillet og for at kunne forbedre det. 

Vi indsamler ingen personligt identificerbare oplysninger.

For at få mere at vide besøg Juridisk information nederst på skærmen (bottom of the screen)

english: When enabled, the current game will create an auto-save when abandoned or when the game is quit.
translation: Når dette er aktiveret opretter det aktuelle spil en autogemning når det forlades eller når spillet afsluttes.

english: Background rotation is removed, which should help if you experience motion sickness in-game.
translation: Baggrundsrotation fjernes, hvilket bør hjælpe med at reducere køresyge

english: Enable features to help translators, such as Alt to reveal English and Ctrl to reveal the phrase key. Enables the translation editing window ({TranslatorWindow}).
translation: Aktivér funktioner der hjælper oversættere såsom Alt for at vise engelsk og Ctrl for at vise nøglefrasen. Aktiverer vinduet til redigering af oversættelser ({TranslatorWindow}).

english: You will be missing *X when ongoing deliveries/logistics complete
translation: Du vil mangle *X når igangværende leverancer og logistik er fuldført

english: Upgrade your hull with armour panels to absorb damage
translation: Opgrader dit skrog med panserpaneler for at absorbere skade

english: Create an entirely new ship from scratch
translation: Opret et helt nyt skib fra bunden

english: Deconstruct your ship square by square
translation: Nedbyg dit skib felt for felt

english: Install a docking port. Every ship needs at least one functioning docking port.
translation: Installer en dockingport. Hvert skib skal have mindst én fungerende dockingport.

english: Queue the installation of equipment inside your ship.
translation: Sæt installation af udstyr i kø inde i dit skib.

english: Lets you select a paint from the exterior of your ship (can also be used by pressing the "{AltTool}" key)
translation: Lader dig vælge en maling fra ydersiden af dit skib (kan også bruges ved at trykke på "{AltTool}"-tasten) (can also be used by pressing the {AltTool} key)

english: Expand your habitation deck to support more crew and passengers
translation: Udvid dit beboelsesdæk for at understøtte flere besætningsmedlemmer og passagerer

english: Modify the shape of your spaceship hull
translation: Ændr formen på dit rumskibs skrog

english: Open up the interior of your spaceship to create cabins
translation: Åbn interiøret i dit rumskib for at skabe kabiner

english: Toggle painting the floor tiles of your ship
translation: Slå maling af gulvfliserne på dit skib til eller fra

english: Toggle painting the exterior panels of the habitation quarters of your ship
translation: Slå maling af de udvendige paneler på dit skibs beboelseskvarterer til eller fra

english: Toggle painting the exterior panels of the hull of your ship
translation: Slå maling af de udvendige paneler på dit skibs skrog til eller fra

english: Toggle painting the scaffolding on your ship
translation: Slå maling af stilladset på dit skib til eller fra

english: Change the colour of decals applied to the walls of your ship
translation: Skift farven på dekaler på dit skibs vægge

english: Toggle painting the base colour of the walls of your ship
translation: Slå maling af grundfarven på dit skibs vægge til eller fra

english: Add scaffolding to support equipment on the exterior of your ship
translation: Tilføj stillads for at understøtte udstyr på ydersiden af dit skib

english: Spawn equipment and resources inside your ship. (Creative Mode only)
translation: Skab udstyr og ressourcer inde i dit skib. (Kun kreativ tilstand) (Creative Mode only)

english: Apply or remove decals on the walls of your ship
translation: Påfør eller fjern dekaler på dit skibs vægge

english: Build walls inside your spaceship to partition the interior space
translation: Byg vægge i dit rumskib for at opdele det indre rum

english: To submit completed parts to the stargate project, sell them at any trade outpost in the sector
translation: For at indsende færdige dele til stargate-projektet skal du sælge dem ved en hvilken som helst handelsstation i sektoren.
Lås denne komponent op gennem forskning!

english: Captain, the new sector needs to be surveyed before your sector map is populated with systems. We have a full scan underway for the sector, once it's completed more locations will be marked on your map.
translation: Kaptajn den nye sektor skal undersøges før dit sektorkort bliver fyldt med systemer. Vi er i gang med en fuld scanning af sektoren og når den er færdig vil flere lokationer blive markeret på dit kort.

english: In the systems surveyed so far we've found new resources and severe weather systems, which may be just a glimpse into what awaits us in this sector.
translation: I de systemer der indtil videre er undersøgt har vi fundet nye ressourcer og voldsomme vejrsystemer som måske kun er et glimt af hvad der venter os i denne sektor.

english: Who knows what you may find out here. Be careful, Captain.
translation: Hvem ved hvad du kan finde herude. Vær forsigtig Kaptajn.

english: By submitting this item, you agree to the
translation: Ved at indsende dette element accepterer du

english: By submitting this item, you agree to the
translation: Ved at indsende dette element accepterer du

english: After a long and perilous journey, the survivors emerged into a new and uncharted galaxy.  Those left behind faced a desperate, nomadic life.  But those that made the jump face an even more uncertain future.  Humanity's survival remains on a knife edge...
translation: Efter en lang og farefuld rejse trådte de overlevende ind i en ny og ukendt galakse. De der blev tilbage stod over for et desperat nomadeliv. Men de der gennemførte springet står over for en endnu mere usikker fremtid. Menneskehedens overlevelse hænger stadig i en tynd tråd...

english: We hope you enjoyed playing the demo of The Last Starship. Your journey has just begun!  Unlock the full game to explore more Story Episodes, Survival Mode, Arena Mode, a full Ship Editor and more!
translation: Vi håber du nød at spille demoen af The Last Starship. Din rejse er kun lige begyndt! Lås det fulde spil op for at udforske flere historieepisoder, Survival Mode, Arena Mode, en fuld skibseditor og meget mere!
AUTOMATISK MÅLRETNING\n[LMB] Aktivér automatisk målretning\n[RMB] Deaktivér automatisk målretning

english: When enabled, the Docking Assistant will perform the final maneuovers required to dock your ship with another, once you are close enough.\n\nIt is recommended you disable Fleet Formation when attempting to dock.
translation: Når aktiveret, vil TILKOBLINGS ASSISTENT udføre de sidste manøvrer, der kræves for at tilkoble dit skib til et andet, når du er tæt nok på.\n\nDet anbefales at deaktivere FLÅDE FORMATION, når du forsøger at tilkoble.

english: When enabled, your other fleet ships will take care of themselves during combat, moving to optimal range and engaging as best they can.
translation: Når aktiveret, vil dine andre flådeskibe klare sig selv under kamp, bevæge sig til optimal rækkevidde og angribe bedst muligt.

english: When enabled, all of the fleet ships within a system will fly together in close formation, following the lead of whichever ship you are directly controlling.
translation: Når aktiveret, vil alle flådeskibe i et system flyve sammen i tæt formation og følge det skib, du direkte kontrollerer.

english: When enabled, the camera's rotation and position track the currently selected layer.
translation: Når aktiveret, vil kameraets rotation og position fokusere på dette lag

english: [LMB] Select weapon\n[SHIFT-LMB] Select multiple weapons\n[RMB] Clear current target
translation: [LMB] Vælg våben\n[SHIFT-LMB] Vælg flere våben\n[RMB] Ryd nuværende mål

english: Starting a new research project will lose all progress on the current one.
translation: Hvis du starter et nyt forskningsprojekt mister du al fremdrift på det nuværende.

english: This research project requires a *X to be completed
translation: Dette forskningsprojekt kræver en *X for at blive fuldført

english: Unlocks the ability to convert tracks into splitters, and vice versa. Splitters will evenly distribute items between their output directions.
translation: Låser op for muligheden for at konvertere spor til splittere og omvendt. Splittere vil fordele genstande jævnt mellem deres udgange.

english: Unlocks schematics for hardware required to maintain a breathable atmosphere
translation: Låser op for tegninger til udstyr, der kræves for at gøre atmosfæren beboelig.

english: Unlocks more schematics for hardware required to maintain a breathable atmosphere
translation: Låser op for flere tegninger til udstyr, der kræves for at gøre atmosfæren beboelig.

english: Unlocks schematics for Tracks and Robot Arms
translation: Låser op for tegninger til spor og robotarme

english: Unlocks schematic for Short Robot Arm
translation: Låser op for tegning til kort robotarm

english: Unlocks schematics to build a defensive system that can deflect incoming cannon shells
translation: Låser op for tegninger til at bygge et forsvarssystem der kan aflede indkommende kanongranater

english: Unlocks schematics for construction of Logistics Drones
translation: Låser op for tegninger til konstruktion af logistikdroner

english: Upgrades drones so they collect minerals in batches, greatly speeding up the process
translation: Opgraderer droner så de indsamler mineraler i batches hvilket øger hastigheden markant

english: Increases the top speed of Drones by 50%
Increases the top speed of Drones by 100%
Spend research credits to continually increase the speed of our drones.
translation: Brug forskningskreditter til løbende at øge hastigheden på vores droner.

english: Unlocks schematic for Energy Transmitter and Receiver
translation: Låser op for tegning til energisender og modtager

english: Unlocks efficiency improvements for all areas of life support and crew survival
translation: Låser op for effektivitetsforbedringer i alle områder af livsopretholdelse og besætningens overlevelse

english: Improves crop yield to produce more food per cycle
translation: Forbedrer afgrødeudbyttet så der produceres mere mad pr. cyklus

english: Further improves crop yield, and unlocks schematics to manufacture Hydroponics Modules
translation: Forbedrer yderligere afgrødeudbyttet og låser op for tegninger til fremstilling af Hydroponics-moduler

english: Spend research credits to continually increase our crop yield.
translation: Brug forskningskreditter til løbende at øge vores udbytte af afgrøder.

english: Unlocks schematics for small logistics storage
translation: Låser op for tegninger til lille logistisk lager

english: Unlocks schematics for Medium sized storage
translation: Låser op for tegninger til mellemstort lager

english: Unlocks schematics for Large logistics storage
translation: Låser op for tegninger til stort logistisk lager

english: Spend research credits to continually increase our smelting efficiency.
translation: Brug forskningskreditter til løbende at øge vores smelteeffektivitet.

english: Mining Lasers extract twice as many minerals per shot
translation: Mine-lasere udvinder dobbelt så mange mineraler pr. skud

english: Mining Lasers extract three times as many minerals per shot
translation: Mining-lasere udvinder tre gange så mange mineraler pr. skud

english: Infuse energy storage with Neubidium, providing it with enhanced efficiency and improved conductive properties.
translation: Tilfør energilagring Neubidium så den får forbedret effektivitet og bedre ledende egenskaber.

english: The mineral collected from the local asteroid has never been seen before, we should investigate its uses.
translation: Mineralet indsamlet fra den lokale asteroide er aldrig set før. Vi bør undersøge dets anvendelsesmuligheder.

english: Simulations predict that the new charged crystals allow the Stargate to jump ships to different galaxies. The Stargate's computer systems need to be upgraded to handle this.
translation: Simulationer forudsiger at de nye ladede krystaller gør det muligt for Stargaten at sende skibe til andre galakser. Stargatens computersystemer skal opgraderes for at håndtere dette.

english: Spend research credits to continually improve the efficiency of our reactors.
translation: Brug forskningskreditter til løbende at forbedre effektiviteten af vores reaktorer.

english: Improves all life-support recycling to 90% efficiency
Brings all life-support recycling up to 100% efficiency
Doubles the speed of all Robot Arms
Spend research credits to continually increase our robot arm speed.
translation: Brug forskningskreditter til løbende at øge hastigheden på vores robotarme.

english: Unlocks improvements in all areas of advanced physics
translation: Låser forbedringer op inden for alle områder af avanceret fysik

english: Unlock surveying the current sector for new systems nearby.
translation: Låser op for kortlægning af den nuværende sektor efter nye systemer i nærheden.

english: Unlocks schematic for Smart Robot Arm
translation: Låser op for tegning til smart robotarm

english: Unlocks Phase 1 and 2 of the Andromeda Project.
translation: Låser fase 1 og 2 af Andromeda-projektet op.

english: Unlocks Phase 3 of the Andromeda Project.
Unlocks Phases 4 and 5 of the Andromeda Project.
translation: Låser Fase 4 og 5 af Andromeda-projektet op.

english: Doubles the speed of all Tracks
Triples the speed of all Tracks
Unlocks schematics for hardware to capture and reprocess human waste
translation: Låser op for tegninger til udstyr, der kan opsamle og behandle affald.

english: Stable Zeleon is a safe, energy-dense gas that could be used for advanced energy storage.
translation: Stabil Zeleon er en sikker energitæt gas som kan bruges til avanceret energilagring.

english: The new gas we've observed seems to be quite unstable and is radiating high amounts of energy, our scientists need to find a safe way to collect and stabilise it.
translation: Den nye gas vi har observeret virker ret ustabil og udsender store mængder energi. Vores forskere skal finde en sikker måde at indsamle og stabilisere den på.

english: Perform sector scans to find derelict ships that contain research credits.
translation: Udfør sektorscanninger for at finde forladte skibe som indeholder forskningskreditter.

english: Completing Andromeda Project phases ahead of the Deep Space Industrialists storyline will bypass those episodes.
translation: Hvis Andromeda-projektets faser gennemføres før Deep Space Industrialists-historien, springes disse episoder over.

english: After some careful analysis of the Stargate's blueprints, I have found the backdoor that the late Alexander James Elistar has left you.
translation: Efter en grundig analyse af Stargatens tegninger har jeg fundet bagdøren, som den afdøde Alexander James Elistar har efterladt til dig.

english: You will use this backdoor to upload a small virus that I have written to their command centre within the HQ. It will disable the station's offensive capabilities and place itself under your command.
translation: Du vil bruge denne bagdør til at uploade en lille virus, som jeg har skrevet, til deres kommandocenter i Hovedkvarteret. Den vil deaktivere stationens offensive kapaciteter og placere sig selv under din kommando.

english: Great work Captain! But my sensors are detecting a massive signature headi-
translation: Fremragende arbejde, Kaptajn! Men mine sensorer registrerer en massiv signatur på vej-

english: Commander Harken! I see that my first fleet has failed to deal with you. I suppose if I want something done properly I should do it myself.
translation: Kommandør Harken! Jeg kan se, at min første flåde har fejlet i at stoppe dig. Hvis noget skal gøres ordentligt, må jeg vel gøre det selv.

english: This is DOGMA Private Security force, we are en-route to the disturbance. ETA: imminent.
translation: Dette er DOGMA privat sikkerhedsstyrke, vi er på vej til forstyrrelsen. ETA: umiddelbart forestående.

english: There are multiple hostile signatures inbound on our position! You must get in close range of the HQ and upload the virus. I'll do my best to keep their ships off you.
translation: Der er flere fjendtlige signaturer på vej mod vores position! Du skal komme tæt på Hovedkvarteret og uploade virussen. Jeg vil gøre mit bedste for at holde deres skibe væk fra dig.
De er ved at ankomme, skynd dig!

english: I gave you a very clear warning, Captain. You could've had anything in the universe as our business partner.
translation: Jeg gav dig en meget klar advarsel, Kaptajn. Du kunne have fået alt i universet som vores forretningspartner.

english: It was a pleasure working with you.
translation: Det var en fornøjelse at arbejde med dig.

english: This is a message for Andromeda HQ. I am Commander Harken, Chief of Private Security for this sector, and I command you to stand down.
translation: Dette er en besked til Andromeda Hovedkvarter. Jeg er Kommandør Harken, chef for privat sikkerhed i denne sektor, og jeg beordrer jer til at overgive jer.

english: The Andromeda Navy in this sector has been destroyed, you are now blockaded, there is nothing left to fight for.
translation: Andromeda-flåden i denne sektor er blevet ødelagt, I er nu blokeret, der er intet tilbage at kæmpe for.

english: It's over, Captain. The Andromeda HQ will be placed under the jurisdiction of the Intergalactic Security Council while I make the necessary arrests. The access codes for the Stargate are back under our control.
translation: Det er forbi, Kaptajn. Andromeda Hovedkvarter vil blive overdraget til Det Intergalaktiske Sikkerhedsråd, mens jeg foretager de nødvendige anholdelser. Adgangskoderne til Stargaten er nu tilbage under vores kontrol.

english: The current leadership of the Andromeda Project will be dismantled and the new galaxy will be freed from their control.
translation: Den nuværende ledelse af Andromeda-projektet vil blive afviklet, og den nye galakse vil blive befriet fra deres kontrol.

english: You've proven that you can be trusted with control of the Stargate, so I'll leave it in your hands.
translation: Du har bevist, at du kan betros kontrollen over Stargaten, så jeg overlader den i dine hænder.

english: Goodbye Captain, and good luck with your new place in the galaxy.
translation: Farvel Kaptajn, og held og lykke med din nye plads i galaksen.

english: I don't understand, how is that possible!?
translation: Jeg forstår det ikke, hvordan er det muligt!?

english: Send all available power to railguns, set target to-
translation: Send al tilgængelig strøm til railguns, sæt mål til-

english: DANGER: POWER SYSTEMS DETERIORATING. POWER GRID OVERLOADED.\nNO POWER TO WEAPONS AND ENGINES.
translation: FARE: STRØMSYSTEMER SVIGTER. STRØMNET OVERBELASTET.\nINGEN STRØM TIL VÅBEN OG MOTORER.

english: Hello Captain, it's good to see you. These are all of the ships I control in this sector, the rest are on the other side of the Stargate, unable to reach us.
translation: Hej Kaptajn, det er godt at se dig. Dette er alle de skibe, jeg kontrollerer i denne sektor. Resten er på den anden side af Stargaten og kan ikke nå os.

english: My officers have pin-pointed the position of their HQ. Upon arrival we expect to be met with heavy resistance from their private security forces.
translation: Mine officerer har fastslået positionen af deres Hovedkvarter. Ved ankomst forventer vi at møde kraftig modstand fra deres private sikkerhedsstyrker.

english: I should be able to grab their attention away from your fleet while you get close and take control of the station.
translation: Jeg bør kunne tiltrække deres opmærksomhed væk fra din flåde, mens du kommer tæt på og overtager stationen.

english: Good luck Captain, I'll see you on the battlefield.
translation: Held og lykke, Kaptajn. Vi ses på slagmarken.

english: Captain, I can route a signal to their powergrid and overload their generators, tell me when to trigger it!
translation: Kaptajn, jeg kan sende et signal til deres strømnet og overbelaste deres generatorer. Sig til, når jeg skal aktivere det!

english: I've lost both of my frigates Captain! I don't have enough firepower to win this!
translation: Jeg har mistet begge mine fregatter, Kaptajn! Jeg har ikke nok ildkraft til at vinde dette!

english: This is the Andromeda Navy's flagship! You should have access to its command centre from the HQ!
translation: Dette er Andromeda-flådens flagskib! Du burde have adgang til dets kommandocenter fra Hovedkvarteret!

english: Captain! The ship's weapons and engines are disabled, hit it with everything you've got!
translation: Kaptajn! Skibets våben og motorer er deaktiveret, giv den alt, hvad du har!

english: Greetings Captain, I was worried you had taken their side in all of this.
translation: Hilsen Kaptajn, jeg var bange for, at du havde valgt deres side i alt dette.

english: Captain! In direct violation of intergalactic law, the Andromeda Project has permanently closed access to the Stargate outside of their own ships. Colonists are stranded in the new sector, unable to return home.
translation: Kaptajn! I direkte strid med intergalaktisk lov har Andromeda-projektet permanent lukket adgangen til Stargaten for alle andre end deres egne skibe. Kolonister er strandet i den nye sektor og kan ikke vende hjem.

english: The Andromeda Project has moved their HQ and all key personell into an unknown location in the new sector, where we believe they are controlling the Stargate.
translation: Andromeda-projektet har flyttet deres Hovedkvarter og alt nøglepersonel til et ukendt sted i den nye sektor, hvor vi mener, de kontrollerer Stargaten.

english: You are the only one outside of the Andromeda Project with access codes, please call back as soon as you can. They must be stopped.
translation: Du er den eneste uden for Andromeda-projektet med adgangskoder. Kontakt os venligst hurtigst muligt. De skal stoppes.

english: My plan is to use our fleets to take control of the HQ by force. Any and all damage to the HQ should be avoided, many innocent lives are on-board and the loss of life from destroying it would be far too great.\nI have devised a plan with an old friend of yours that should minimise casualties...
translation: Min plan er at bruge vores flåder til at overtage Hovedkvarteret med magt. Enhver skade på Hovedkvarteret skal undgås, der er mange uskyldige liv ombord, og tabet af liv ved at ødelægge det ville være alt for stort.\nJeg har udtænkt en plan sammen med en gammel ven af dig, som bør minimere tabene...

english: While you neutralise the HQ, my fleet will fight off the Andromeda Project navy. Once the battle is over, I will take control of the HQ and arrest everyone involved. Their conglomerate will be dismantled.
translation: Mens du neutraliserer Hovedkvarteret, vil min flåde holde Andromeda-projektets flåde tilbage. Når slaget er ovre, vil jeg overtage Hovedkvarteret og arrestere alle involverede. Deres konglomerat vil blive opløst.

english: The Stargate will fall back into our control. I've marked an allied shipyard on your map. I'll hide out there in the mean-time.
translation: Stargaten vil falde tilbage under vores kontrol. Jeg har markeret et allieret værft på dit kort. Jeg vil gemme mig der i mellemtiden.

english: Meet me to discuss the plan further. Goodbye for now.
translation: Mød mig for at drøfte planen yderligere. Farvel for nu.

english: Take control of the Andromeda Project HQ
Assist the Institute with their experiments
Deliver the Tiddlets to the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms
translation: Lever Tiddlets til Institut for Interstellare Livsformer

english: Purchase at least one Logistics Drone
Install at least one Drone Bay
No! Nooooo! Captain what happened? What did you do??
translation: Nej! Neeeej! Kaptajn, hvad skete der? Hvad gjorde du??

english: It looks like they died of shock during the hyperspace jump.  Oh goodness, this is such horrible news.  Did any of them survive?
translation: Det ser ud til, at de døde af chok under hyperspace-hoppet. Åh gud, det er frygtelige nyheder. Overlevede nogen af dem?

english: We'll have to be so careful from now on, Captain. I suggest a maximum hyperspace jump range of *X light years while you have these creatures on board. We can't let any more of them perish this way.
translation: Vi bliver nødt til at være meget forsigtige fremover, kaptajn. Jeg foreslår en maksimal hyperspace-hop-afstand på *X lysår, mens du har disse væsner ombord. Vi kan ikke lade flere af dem dø på den måde.

english: This is the greatest day of my life!
translation: Dette er den største dag i mit liv!

english: To be the first to discover and study an entirely new life form. One native to deep space! Think of all we can learn from these little creatures!
translation: At være den første til at opdage og studere en helt ny livsform. En der er hjemmehørende i det dybe rum! Tænk på alt det, vi kan lære af disse små væsner!

english: I mean, you'll get some credit for finding them, of course. But I've waited my whole life for a moment like this.
translation: Du får selvfølgelig også noget af æren for at have fundet dem. Men jeg har ventet hele mit liv på et øjeblik som dette.

english: I've been analysing the onboard sensor data while you've been travelling around.  They don't exhibit any sort of physical mating behaviour, but there is a detectable energy exchange going on, and always between groups of three.
translation: Jeg har analyseret sensordataene ombord, mens du har rejst rundt. De udviser ikke nogen form for fysisk parringsadfærd, men der foregår en målbar energiudveksling – og altid mellem grupper på tre.

english: They must be reproducing through some form of telepathy, and only in triplets, and only in hyperspace!  No wonder they're such a rare creature.
translation: De må reproducere sig gennem en form for telepati – og kun i tripletter, og kun i hyperspace! Det er ikke så mærkeligt, at de er så sjældne væsner.

english: You'll be getting a call from Dr Swanson very soon.  He funds my lab and all of my research.  I've talked him into directing some of our research grant to you, as a fair reward.
translation: Du vil meget snart få et opkald fra Dr. Swanson. Han finansierer mit laboratorium og al min forskning. Jeg har overtalt ham til at dirigere en del af vores forskningsbevilling til dig som en rimelig belønning.
Ved alle guder. Du har fundet dem.
Åh gud. De er stadig i live??

english: Oh jesus. There's two of them!
translation: Åh jesus. Der er to af dem!

english: Captain, you've made an incredible discovery. We have seen these interstellar lifeforms before, on large asteroids deep in uncharted space. But never alive. And you've found a pair!
translation: Kaptajn, du har gjort en utrolig opdagelse. Vi har set disse interstellare livsformer før, på store asteroider dybt ude i ukendt rum. Men aldrig levende. Og du har fundet et par!

english: What is a ship like yours doing all the way out here?
translation: Hvad laver et skib som dit helt herude?

english: Maybe you can help?  I'm looking for creatures that usually live on small isolated asteroids, like the one in this system.
translation: Måske kan du hjælpe? Jeg leder efter væsner, som normalt lever på små, isolerede asteroider – som den i dette system.

english: If you find anything make sure to tell me.
translation: Hvis du finder noget, så sørg for at fortælle mig det.

english: Oh my goodness, I hope they're ok! What's happening??
translation: Åh gud, jeg håber, de er okay! Hvad sker der??

english: Are you kidding me! They've... They've reproduced! We've just witnessed an interstellar life form, spontaneously reproducing!
translation: Mener du det! De har... de har reproduceret sig! Vi har netop været vidne til en interstellar livsform der spontant reproducerer sig!

english: Oh this is just such incredible news. But what was the condition? Maybe these ones were already fertile and pregnant? Did you see any mating behaviours? I need to do more analysis.
translation: Åh, det er simpelthen fantastiske nyheder. Men hvad var deres tilstand? Måske var disse allerede fertile og gravide? Så du nogen parringsadfærd? Jeg er nødt til at lave flere analyser.

english: Keep looking Captain. Bring them all back to us when you're done.
translation: Bliv ved med at lede, kaptajn. Bring dem alle tilbage til os, når du er færdig.

english: You managed to bring them back? Amazing! I'll be here in a second.
translation: Du lykkedes med at bringe dem tilbage? Fantastisk! Jeg er der om et øjeblik.

english: I should introduce myself. My name is Artemis Toppingbury, and I'm a professor at the Institute of Interstellar Lifeforms.  We've been trying to find a live Tiddlet for years now.
translation: Jeg bør præsentere mig selv. Mit navn er Artemis Toppingbury, og jeg er professor ved Institut for Interstellare Livsformer. Vi har forsøgt at finde en levende Tiddlet i årevis nu.

english: This is a massive breakthrough. Bring the Tiddlets on board, carefully, using a Logistics Drone. Once you have them, meet me at the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms.  We're at Starbase S*X.
translation: Dette er et enormt gennembrud. Tag Tiddlets ombord forsigtigt ved hjælp af en logistikdrone. Når du har dem, så mød mig ved Institut for Interstellare Livsformer. Vi befinder os på Starbase S*X.

english: Now we know where to look, we may be able to find more of them in deep space.
translation: Nu hvor vi ved, hvor vi skal lede, kan vi måske finde flere af dem i det dybe rum.

english: The asteroid where you found them has a large iron and aluminium core, with some unusual crystalline structures on the outside.
translation: Asteroiden, hvor du fandt dem, har en stor kerne af jern og aluminium med nogle usædvanlige krystallinske strukturer på ydersiden.

english: There are similar asteroids within this sector that have been recorded and scanned.  Nobody would bother trying to mine such worthless rocks. They might not have looked too closely.
translation: Der er lignende asteroider i denne sektor, som er blevet registreret og scannet. Ingen ville normalt forsøge at udvinde så værdiløse sten, så de er måske ikke blevet undersøgt særlig nøje.

english: I think it's worth searching there for more of these creatures.
translation: Jeg tror, det er værd at lede der efter flere af disse væsner.

english: Captain. On behalf of the Institute for Interstellar Life, thank you. A monumental discovery.
translation: Kaptajn. På vegne af Institut for Interstellart Liv, tak. En monumental opdagelse.

english: Now let's talk real. Scientists like Artemis like to take all the credit, and bask in the glory of their peers. If your name does show up in their research paper, you can bet it will be on the very last page, in the smallest font available.
translation: Lad os nu tale ærligt. Forskere som Artemis kan godt lide at tage al æren og sole sig i deres kollegers beundring. Hvis dit navn overhovedet dukker op i deres forskningsartikel, kan du være sikker på, at det står på allersidste side – med den mindste skriftstørrelse.

english: And despite funding his work for years now, my name will be even lower. It's fine really. We have different aims.  He can have the glory. I'm interested in the breakthroughs. The science that comes from these discoveries. The potential.
translation: Og selv om jeg har finansieret hans arbejde i årevis nu, vil mit navn stå endnu længere nede. Det er egentlig fint. Vi har forskellige mål. Han kan få æren. Jeg er interesseret i gennembruddene. Videnskaben, der kommer ud af disse opdagelser. Potentialet.

english: Captain. We're hoping to run some more experiments on the new life form I discovered. The Toppingbury Tiddlet. If you could visit my institute, I have a contract that may be of interest to you.
translation: Kaptajn. Vi håber at kunne udføre nogle flere eksperimenter på den nye livsform, jeg opdagede – Toppingbury Tiddlet. Hvis du kunne besøge mit institut, har jeg en kontrakt, som måske vil have din interesse.

english: We've made another interesting discovery!  Our sensors were correct, and it appears some type of tiny crystal has been formed at the core of several of the dead creatures.  Almost like a small diamond.
translation: Vi har gjort endnu en interessant opdagelse! Vores sensorer havde ret, og det ser ud til, at der er dannet en slags lille krystal i kernen af flere af de døde væsner – næsten som en lille diamant.

english: It must have formed in the final moments of their life. All that telepathic energy, focussed into a lethal feedback loop!  Our lab tells us the crystals aren't like anything they've ever seen before.  Let's get the remaining samples in for analysis.
translation: Den må være blevet dannet i de sidste øjeblikke af deres liv. Al den telepatiske energi, fokuseret i en dødelig feedback-loop! Vores laboratorium fortæller os, at krystallerne ikke ligner noget, de nogensinde har set før. Lad os få de resterende prøver ind til analyse.

english: I'll hand you over to my colleague for the final experiment.
translation: Jeg overlader dig til min kollega til det sidste eksperiment.

english: Captain, the Professor has asked me to oversee this phase of the experiment.
translation: Kaptajn, professoren har bedt mig om at føre tilsyn med denne fase af eksperimentet.

english: I need you to make a long range jump. Beyond the safe tiddlet distance.  We need to know what happens to them under the effects of Hyperspace Shock, and this will also help us to calculate that safe distance more accurately.
translation: Jeg har brug for, at du foretager et hop over lang afstand – ud over den sikre Tiddlet-distance. Vi er nødt til at vide, hvad der sker med dem under virkningen af hyperspace-chok, og det vil også hjælpe os med at beregne den sikre afstand mere præcist.

english: Get into position and make the long range jump.
translation: Kom i position og foretag hoppet over lang afstand.

english: Let's start simple. A couple of medium range hops should do the trick.
translation: Lad os starte simpelt. Et par hop på mellemafstand burde gøre tricket.

english: Excellent. The sensor is working nicely and we are receiving science packets. Let's do one more medium range hop to gather some more data.
translation: Fremragende. Sensoren fungerer fint, og vi modtager videnskabelige datapakker. Lad os tage endnu et hop på mellemafstand for at indsamle lidt flere data.

english: Make a jump longer than the Tiddlet safe distance
translation: Foretag et hop længere end Tiddlets sikre afstand.

english: Return the Tiddlets to the Institute
Return the bodies to the Institute
Travel to the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms
translation: Rejs til Institut for Interstellare Livsformer

english: *X of the Tiddlets appear to have perished.
translation: *X af Tiddlets ser ud til at være døde.

english: The sensor data suggests the telepathic mating ritual does begin during the longer jump.  But the telepathic energy induced between them produces so much heat at their core that they ultimately catch fire and burn out from the inside.
translation: Sensordataene tyder på, at det telepatiske parringsritual faktisk begynder under det længere hop. Men den telepatiske energi, der opstår mellem dem, udvikler så meget varme i deres kerne, at de til sidst bryder i brand og brænder op indefra.

english: One can only imagine what that must feel like.
translation: Man kan kun forestille sig, hvordan det må føles.

english: The word on the grapevine is that the Nobel prize committee may be looking at our work.
translation: Der går rygter om, at Nobelpriskomiteen måske kigger på vores arbejde.

english: Exactly. So we must continue this important research. We have a great deal of data already, but we need to take some more measurements and refine some of our estimates. We are particularly interested in their reproductive process.
translation: Netop. Derfor må vi fortsætte denne vigtige forskning. Vi har allerede en stor mængde data, men vi er nødt til at foretage nogle flere målinger og forfine nogle af vores estimater. Vi er især interesserede i deres reproduktionsproces.

english: We're going to send you a batch of Toppingbury Tiddlets, and we want you to run a series of tests on them under Hyperspace conditions.
translation: Vi vil sende dig en gruppe Toppingbury Tiddlets, og vi vil have dig til at udføre en række tests på dem under hyperspace-forhold.

english: We're also sending you a pair of specially modified science stations, with a sensor attuned to their telepathic reproductive process. I wrote the firmware myself. We will be able to see deep into their minds when this magical process takes place.
translation: Vi sender dig også et par specialmodificerede videnskabsstationer med en sensor, der er afstemt efter deres telepatiske reproduktionsproces. Jeg har selv skrevet firmwaren. Vi vil kunne se dybt ind i deres sind, når denne magiske proces finder sted.

english: We need to zero in on exactly how long the Tiddlets can survive in hyperspace. This will regrettably require you to jump beyond the safe distance, and to record the effect on their telepathic process. Some of the Tiddlets may be lost in the process of this experiment.
translation: Vi er nødt til præcist at fastslå, hvor længe Tiddlets kan overleve i hyperspace. Det vil desværre kræve, at du hopper ud over den sikre afstand og registrerer effekten på deres telepatiske proces. Nogle af Tiddlets kan gå tabt under dette eksperiment.

english: That does make me quite uncomfortable.
translation: Det gør mig faktisk ret utilpas.

english: We'd like to see the effect of a very short hop.  We want to know if there is a minimum hyperspace distance, below which their reproductive process simply does not occur.  Make the jump and let's see how they do.
translation: Vi vil gerne se effekten af et meget kort hop. Vi vil finde ud af, om der er en minimumsafstand i hyperspace, under hvilken deres reproduktionsproces simpelthen ikke finder sted. Foretag hoppet, så ser vi, hvordan det går.

english: Captain, there have been several developments with the Tiddlet Research Program. We are in need of a competent starship pilot once again.  Please visit us at the Institute for Interstellar lifeforms and I can tell you more.
translation: Kaptajn, der har været flere nye udviklinger i Tiddlet-forskningsprogrammet. Vi har igen brug for en kompetent stjerneskibspilot. Besøg os venligst ved Institut for Interstellare Livsformer, så kan jeg fortælle dig mere.

english: Captain, thank Goodness.  Are they all safe?
translation: Kaptajn, gudskelov. Er de alle i sikkerhed?

english: Quickly, before they figure out what's happening.  I'll override the remote transceiver on the farm ship.  For a few minutes we'll be able to control it ourselves.
translation: Skynd dig, før de finder ud af, hvad der sker. Jeg vil tilsidesætte den fjernstyrede transceiver på farmfartøjet. I et par minutter kan vi selv styre det.

english: Long enough to put an end to this horror show.  Take the ship over to the asteroid.  Open the docking bay doors.
translation: Længe nok til at få en ende på dette rædselsshow. Flyv skibet over til asteroiden. Åbn dokningsportene.

english: You did the right thing, Captain.  That matters, to me at least.
translation: Du gjorde det rigtige, kaptajn. Det betyder noget – i det mindste for mig.

english: I wouldn't worry too much about the threat.  He knows he's operating completely illegally.  There's no way the charter of deep space life permits this kind of action.
translation: Jeg ville ikke bekymre mig for meget om truslen. Han ved, at han handler helt ulovligt. Der er ingen måde, at charteret for liv i det dybe rum tillader den slags handlinger.

english: As for the Tiddlets, the Doctor is sure to return and try to capture more.  I'll do my best to keep them safe from him, for as long as I can.
translation: Hvad angår Tiddlets, vil doktoren helt sikkert vende tilbage og forsøge at fange flere. Jeg vil gøre mit bedste for at holde dem væk fra ham, så længe jeg kan.

english: You may as well keep the rescue ship.  You could sell it if you need to raise some funds.
translation: Du kan lige så godt beholde redningsskibet. Du kan sælge det, hvis du har brug for at skaffe nogle midler.

english: Captain, this is wrong.  You know it is.
translation: Kaptajn, det her er forkert. Det ved du godt.

english: Please don't do this.  These creatures deserve more than to be battery farmed and slaughtered.
translation: Lad være med at gøre det. Disse væsner fortjener mere end at blive opdrættet som batterier og slagtet.

english: My clearances have all been revoked.  They've shut me out completely.  It's up to you, but please make the right choice.
translation: Alle mine tilladelser er blevet tilbagekaldt. De har fuldstændig udelukket mig. Det er op til dig, men vælg venligst det rigtige.

english: I'm hiding out in system S*X.  It's where you found the first Tiddlets, near that unusual asteroid.  Bring them here, and be careful not to risk Hyperspace shock.
translation: Jeg holder mig skjult i system S*X. Det er der, du fandt de første Tiddlets, nær den usædvanlige asteroide. Bring dem hertil, og pas på ikke at risikere hyperspace-chok.

english: We're going to set them all free.
translation: Vi vil sætte dem alle fri.
Kaptajn, vær sød ikke at gøre det!

english: Yes!  I knew this would work!  We can battery farm the tiddlets, in huge quantities, right here in this system!  Keep going.  We need more!
translation: Ja! Jeg vidste, det ville virke! Vi kan masseopdrætte Tiddlets i enorme mængder lige her i dette system! Bliv ved. Vi har brug for flere!

english: It looks like that last jump fried the hop drive.  Not great, given what we paid for it.
translation: Det ser ud til, at det sidste hop ødelagde hopdrevet. Ikke ligefrem ideelt, når man tænker på, hvad vi betalte for det.

english: No matter.  I'm certain my engineers can repair it.  In any case, I want the hop drive to be installed on the farm ship directly.
translation: Det gør ikke noget. Jeg er sikker på, at mine ingeniører kan reparere det. Under alle omstændigheder vil jeg have hopdrevet installeret direkte på farmfartøjet.

english: Captain! It's so good to hear from you again.  How have you been?
translation: Kaptajn! Det er så godt at høre fra dig igen. Hvordan har du haft det?

english: We've been taking some time to recover.  I must admit, I spent so long planning my brother's rescue, I almost don't know what to do with myself.
translation: Vi har brugt lidt tid på at komme os. Jeg må indrømme, at jeg brugte så lang tid på at planlægge redningen af min bror, at jeg næsten ikke ved, hvad jeg skal stille op med mig selv nu.

english: Marcus has been in and out of hospital since the rescue.  He has burns all over his body, and took quite a serious dose of radiation.
translation: Marcus har været ind og ud af hospitalet siden redningen. Han har forbrændinger over hele kroppen og fik en ret alvorlig dosis stråling.

english: Of course, you already know that, because it happened while he was uploading your data.
translation: Det ved du selvfølgelig allerede, fordi det skete, mens han var ved at uploade dine data.

english: The ship is up for sale.  I can't bear to be on-board any longer.  The price is $1M.  But I suppose you did help to build the hop drive, so I'll let you have it for $800k.
translation: Skibet er sat til salg. Jeg kan ikke holde ud at være ombord længere. Prisen er $1M. Men jeg går ud fra, at du hjalp med at bygge hop-drevet, så du kan få det for $800k.

english: Ten years I worked on his rescue.  Ten years.
translation: Jeg arbejdede på hans redning i ti år. Ti år.

english: Do you know what it's like to die from radiation poisoning?  No?  I do.  Since your rescue attempt I've watched it happen.  Hair falls out, organ failure rips through the body.  Vomiting.  Sick and blood.  For days on end.
translation: Ved du, hvordan det er at dø af strålingsforgiftning? Nej? Det gør jeg. Siden din redningsaktion har jeg set det ske. Håret falder af, organsvigt flår gennem kroppen. Opkast. Sygdom og blod. I dagevis.

english: They wouldn't even let me near him.
translation: De ville ikke engang lade mig komme i nærheden af ham.

english: You did that to him, Captain.
translation: Det gjorde du mod ham, kaptajn.

english: OPTIONAL: Take the Tiddlets to Professor Toppingbury instead
translation: VALGFRIT: Tag Tiddlets til professor Toppingbury i stedet
Rejs til det sorte hul S*X

english: Fly L*X close to the Tiddlet farm ship
Pilot the Farm Ship to the asteroid
Bring the ship to the Institute
Deliver Tiddlet bodies to Dr. Swanson
Travel to the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms
translation: Rejs til Institut for Interstellare Livsformer

english: So, onto business.  There is a scientist by the name of Dr. Julian Martinez in a nearby system. He had a moment of fame recently after a daring rescue of his brother.  He has a ship for sale that we believe will be of some use.
translation: Så til sagen. Der er en videnskabsmand ved navn Dr. Julian Martinez i et nærliggende system. Han havde for nylig et øjebliks berømmelse efter en dristig redning af sin bror. Han har et skib til salg, som vi mener kan være nyttigt.

english: Travel to the noble Doctor and buy his ship. He wants a million credits, which is ridiculous.  He thinks his invention is worth that much.  Negotiate with him, knock that price down, and I'll wire the funds directly to him.  If you can improve his offer then I'll pay you 20% of the savings as a bonus.
translation: Rejs til den ærede doktor og køb hans skib. Han vil have en million credits, hvilket er latterligt. Han mener, at hans opfindelse er så meget værd. Forhandl med ham, få prisen ned, så overfører jeg midlerne direkte til ham. Hvis du kan forbedre hans tilbud, betaler jeg dig 20 % af besparelsen som bonus.

english: Regrettably, Professor Toppingbury has been forced to take a leave of absence.  From the stress of his work, you understand.
translation: Desværre har professor Toppingbury været nødt til at tage orlov. På grund af stressen fra hans arbejde, forstår du.

english: We know how they reproduce now, and we know their limits. During hyperspace travel, 3 of them will telepathically reproduce.
translation: Vi ved nu, hvordan de reproducerer sig, og vi kender deres grænser. Under hyperspace-rejser vil tre af dem reproducere sig telepatisk.

english: We're not quite sure yet how long it takes for their children to grow up. However, we've noticed they hop at exactly the same time their parents do.
translation: Vi er endnu ikke helt sikre på, hvor lang tid det tager for deres unger at vokse op. Men vi har bemærket, at de hopper præcis samtidig med deres forældre.

english: This isn't important, but I thought you might find it amusing.
translation: Det er ikke vigtigt, men jeg tænkte, du måske ville finde det morsomt.

english: As you've already seen, they experience hyperspace shock if they've been in hyperspace travel for too long.
translation: Som du allerede har set, oplever de hyperspace-chok, hvis de har været i hyperspace for længe.

english: But the key is in the final stage of their life-cycle.  We know if we expose them to hyperspace shock, their telepathic energies are so strong that a small crystal is formed in their final moments.
translation: Men nøglen ligger i den sidste fase af deres livscyklus. Vi ved, at hvis vi udsætter dem for hyperspace-chok, er deres telepatiske energier så stærke, at der dannes en lille krystal i deres sidste øjeblikke.

english: We've been studying the crystals we've recovered so far.  They resonate in subspace in a way we've never seen before.  Some of the crystals are entangled at the quantum level, and resonate together.  Apply a signal to one and another responds, instantly, across any distance.
translation: Vi har studeret de krystaller, vi har indsamlet indtil videre. De resonerer i subspace på en måde, vi aldrig har set før. Nogle af krystallerne er kvantesammenfiltrede og resonerer sammen. Sender man et signal til én, reagerer en anden øjeblikkeligt – uanset afstand.

english: There are so many potential applications.
translation: Der er så mange potentielle anvendelser.

english: Very disappointing, Captain.  You'll need to do better if you want to succeed out here.  This ship is costing us an arm and a leg.
translation: Meget skuffende, kaptajn. Du bliver nødt til at gøre det bedre, hvis du vil klare dig herude. Dette skib koster os en formue.

english: I'll send the funds to Dr. Martinez now.  Bring the ship back to the Institute, and we can begin work.
translation: Jeg sender pengene til Dr. Martinez nu. Bring skibet tilbage til instituttet, så kan vi begynde arbejdet.

english: As for the rescue ship, we don't need it anymore.  It was the Hop Drive we wanted.  You can keep it if you want, or sell it.
translation: Hvad angår redningsskibet, har vi ikke brug for det længere. Det var hopdrevet, vi ville have. Du kan beholde det, hvis du vil, eller sælge det.

english: I'll be in touch if your services are required in the future.
translation: Jeg kontakter dig, hvis dine tjenester bliver nødvendige i fremtiden.

english: Captain, we lost contact with our ship for a second.  Where are you?  You seem to have gone completely off course.
translation: Kaptajn, vi mistede kontakten med vores skib et øjeblik. Hvor er du? Du ser ud til at være helt uden for kurs.

english: My God.  What have you done?
translation: Min Gud. Hvad har du gjort?

english: Where are they?  Where are my Tiddlets??
translation: Hvor er de? Hvor er mine Tiddlets??

english: Grand Larceny, Property Damage, Fraud, Sabotage.  I'll see to it you spend the next decade in space prison for this.  You and that Professor.
translation: Grov tyveri, ejendomsskade, svindel, sabotage. Jeg skal sørge for, at du tilbringer det næste årti i rumfængsel for dette. Dig og den professor.

english: This is it, Captain. We stand on the verge of a massive achievement.  Can you imagine how many crystals we can produce, in just one jump?  There could be hundreds.  The research potentials are staggering.
translation: Det er det, kaptajn. Vi står på tærsklen til en enorm bedrift. Kan du forestille dig, hvor mange krystaller vi kan producere i bare ét hop? Der kan være hundredvis. Forskningspotentialet er enormt.

english: Our plan is simple, Captain.  We found during your excellent field work that the Tiddlets will still reproduce, even with an incredibly short FTL jump.
translation: Vores plan er enkel, kaptajn. Under dit fremragende feltarbejde fandt vi ud af, at Tiddlets stadig vil reproducere sig, selv ved et ekstremt kort FTL-hop.

english: The ship you just purchased has a specially modified FTL Hop Drive.  We can use it to make very short jumps and trigger the hyperspace reproductive process among the Tiddlets.
translation: Skibet, du lige har købt, har et specialmodificeret FTL-hopdrev. Vi kan bruge det til at foretage meget korte hop og udløse hyperspace-reproduktionsprocessen hos Tiddlets.

english: We want you to pair the Hop Drive ship with our Tiddlet Farm vessel, and activate the short range hop drive.  You won't even need to leave the system.  If our calculations are correct, we should see an instant result.
translation: Vi vil have dig til at parre skibet med hopdrevet med vores Tiddlet Farm-fartøj og aktivere kortdistance-hopdrevet. Du behøver ikke engang forlade systemet. Hvis vores beregninger er korrekte, burde vi se et øjeblikkeligt resultat.

english: This is Dr Swanson at the Institute for Interstellar Lifeforms. I'm declaring an emergency. We need urgent assistance. Our ship is compromised. Please, to any vessel nearby, we need emergency rescue. Many lives are at stake.
translation: Dette er Dr. Swanson fra Institut for Interstellare Livsformer. Jeg erklærer en nødsituation. Vi har brug for øjeblikkelig hjælp. Vores skib er kompromitteret. Venligst, til ethvert skib i nærheden, vi har brug for en nødhjælpsredning. Mange liv står på spil.

english: I tried to stop him. Tried to warn him.
translation: Jeg forsøgte at stoppe ham. Forsøgte at advare ham.

english: Captain, these recent events have made me reconsider my role in all of this. These creatures need our protection. They need somebody to look out for them.
translation: Kaptajn, disse nylige begivenheder har fået mig til at genoverveje min rolle i det hele. Disse væsner har brug for vores beskyttelse. De har brug for nogen, der passer på dem.

english: One last thing.  I couldn't help but notice you've picked up a couple of Tiddlets, along with the scientists you rescued. I wouldn't worry - two is a very safe number.
translation: Én sidste ting. Jeg kunne ikke undgå at bemærke, at du har taget et par Tiddlets med, sammen med de forskere, du reddede. Jeg ville ikke bekymre mig – to er et meget sikkert antal.

english: I thought Dr Swanson was my ally. And I thought I could trust you. But you both put money before everything else. I don't know how you can live like that.
translation: Jeg troede, Dr. Swanson var min allierede. Og jeg troede, jeg kunne stole på dig. Men I satte begge penge over alt andet. Jeg forstår ikke, hvordan I kan leve sådan.

english: You've one last chance to make things right. It looks like a couple of Tiddlets found their way onboard with the scientists you rescued. Two is probably safe, but never bring a third aboard.
translation: Du har én sidste chance for at rette op på tingene. Det ser ud til, at et par Tiddlets er kommet ombord sammen med de forskere, du reddede. To er sandsynligvis sikre, men tag aldrig en tredje ombord.

english: It looks like the Hop Drive burned through all the jump charges. It's over.
translation: Det ser ud til, at hopdrevet har brugt alle hop-ladningerne. Det er slut.

english: Rescue the crew of the farm ship
Oh god... they're in the food stuffs!
translation: Åh gud... de er i fødevarerne!

english: Oh god... they're in the air-conditioning system!
translation: Åh gud... de er i ventilationssystemet!

english: Oh god... they're in the reactor room!
translation: Åh gud... de er i reaktorrummet!

english: Captain, I don't know what happened. It's the Hop Drive. My engineers told me they tested it fully!
translation: Kaptajn, jeg ved ikke, hvad der skete. Det er hopdrevet. Mine ingeniører sagde, at de havde testet det fuldt ud!

english: There's something wrong with it. We can't stop jumping. They've replicated... so many times. They're EVERYWHERE!
translation: Der er noget galt med det. Vi kan ikke stoppe hoppene. De har replikeret… så mange gange. De ER OVERALT!

english: Oh God. There's so many of them! They're in the engines... the life support... they're almost in the reac-
translation: Åh gud. Der er så mange af dem! De er i motorerne… i livsstøtten… de er næsten inde i reakt-

english: Get away from that console! Shoo!
translation: Kom væk fra den konsol! Væk med dig!

english: Help Prof. Artemis Toppingbury with his research.
translation: Hjælp prof. Artemis Toppingbury med hans forskning.

english: Civilians are offering larger sums than normal for safe transit out of the sector
translation: Civile tilbyder større beløb end normalt for sikker transport ud af sektoren

english: Prices for hardware and crew are lower than normal, due to panic
translation: Priser på udstyr og besætning er lavere end normalt på grund af panik

english: Shortages of critical resources have made prices higher than normal
translation: Mangel på kritiske ressourcer har gjort priserne højere end normalt

english: This is what you are translating.
You cannot change the English phrases.
translation: Du kan ikke ændre de engelske tekster.

english: Opens the folder in which your modified translations are saved.\n\n"language.csv" is the file containing your modified translations.
translation: Åbner mappen hvor dine ændrede oversættelser er gemt.\n\n"language.csv" er filen der indeholder dine ændrede oversættelser.

english: This is where you can change the translation.\n\nThis will affect your game only, unless you submit your updated translations to Introversion.
translation: Her kan du ændre oversættelsen.\n\nDette påvirker kun dit spil medmindre du indsender dine opdaterede oversættelser til Introversion.

english: Resets your modified translation back to the original translation.
translation: Nulstiller din ændrede oversættelse tilbage til den oprindelige oversættelse.

english: The AIRDUCT needs to be powered from the REACTOR. Select CABLES from the CONSTRUCTION menu.
translation: LUFTKANAL skal have strøm fra REAKTOR. Vælg KABLER i KONSTRUKTION-menuen.

english: Drag a power cable from the REACTOR to the AIRDUCT, connecting the red circles. POWER CABLES are used to connect reactors to any equipment that needs power. POWER CABLES are red and must connect red circles on equipment.
translation: Træk et strømkabel fra REAKTOR til LUFTKANAL og forbind de røde cirkler. STRØM-KABLER bruges til at forbinde reaktorer til udstyr der kræver strøm. STRØM-KABLER er røde og skal forbinde røde cirkler på udstyr.

english: The AIRDUCT is activated and is pressurising the cabin! The atmosphere will soon be breathable.
translation: LUFTKANAL er aktiveret og tryksætter kabinen! Atmosfæren bliver snart åndbar.

english: We now need to provide a breathable atmosphere for our crew. This is done with an AIRDUCT.\n\nInstall an AIRDUCT somewhere near the Reactor.
translation: Vi skal nu sørge for en åndbar atmosfære til vores besætning. Det gøres med en LUFTKANAL.\n\nInstallér en LUFTKANAL et sted nær reaktoren.

english: The AIRDUCT needs OXYGEN, in the same way as the REACTOR needs FUEL. We can use an OXYGEN LOADER to provide OXYGEN.\n\nInstall an OXYGEN LOADER near the AIRDUCT.
translation: LUFTKANAL har brug for IL T ligesom REAKTOR har brug for BRÆNDSTOF. Vi kan bruge en ILT-PUMPE til at levere ILT.\n\nInstallér en ILT-PUMPE nær LUFTKANAL.

english: We need to connect the OXYGEN LOADER into the AIRDUCT using PIPES.\n\nSelect PIPES from the CONSTRUCTION menu.
translation: Vi skal forbinde ILT-PUMPE til LUFTKANAL med RØR.\n\nVælg RØR i KONSTRUKTION-menuen.

english: Drag a PIPE from the OXYGEN LOADER to the AIRDUCT, connecting the BLUE circles.
translation: Træk et RØR fra ILT-PUMPE til LUFTKANAL og forbind de BLÅ cirkler.

english: BATTLE STATIONS must be activated before your weapons can be used.\n\nThis will tell your crew to prepare for battle!
translation: KAMPSTATIONER skal aktiveres før dine våben kan bruges.\n\nDette fortæller din besætning at de skal gøre klar til kamp!

english: Your crew will run to the weapons to deploy them.\n\nGatling guns don't require any crew to deploy them.
translation: Din besætning vil løbe til våbnene for at gøre dem klar.\n\nGatling-kanoner kræver ingen besætning for at blive indsat.

english: The gun barrels will begin to extend when they arrive.\n\nWhen the barrels are fully extended they will be ready to fire!
translation: Løbene begynder at folde sig ud når de ankommer.\n\nNår løbene er helt udfoldet er de klar til at skyde!

english: We are now going to learn how to deploy our weapons for combat.\n\nThe game has been paused for now.
translation: Vi skal nu lære at indsætte vores våben til kamp.\n\nSpillet er midlertidigt sat på pause.

english: Well done, your weapons are now successfully deployed for battle!
translation: Godt klaret, dine våben er nu korrekt indsat til kamp!

english: NOTE: You can SHIFT CLICK to buy in multiples of 5.
translation: BEMÆRK: Du kan SHIFT-KLIKKE for at købe i multipla af 5.

english: Click on the BUY button to purchase the JMC MINING STATION.
translation: Klik på KØB-knappen for at købe JMC MINING STATION.

english: Click on the JMC MINING STATION, an old unused industrial station for sale.
translation: Klik på JMC MINING STATION en gammel ubrugt industristation til salg.

english: We are now going to learn about selecting and buying ships.
translation: Vi skal nu lære om at vælge og købe skibe.

english: Well done, you have purchased the JMC MINING STATION.
translation: Godt klaret du har købt JMC MINING STATION.

english: Use {PanUp1}{PanLeft1}{PanDown1}{PanRight1} or the ARROW KEYS to move the view around. Zoom the view using the MOUSE WHEEL, or {ZoomIn}/{ZoomOut} on the keyboard. Drag the view by holding the MIDDLE MOUSE BUTTON.
translation: Brug {PanUp1}{PanLeft1}{PanDown1}{PanRight1} eller PILTASTERNE for at flytte visningen. Zoom med MUSEHJULET eller {ZoomIn}/{ZoomOut} på tastaturet. Træk visningen ved at holde MIDTERSTE MUSEKNAP nede.

english: The effect of the EMP is wearing off!\n\nDeploy your weapons and make your crew ready to fight by clicking on BATTLE STATIONS.
translation: EMP-effekten er ved at aftage!\n\nAktivér dine våben og gør din besætning klar til kamp ved at klikke på KAMPSTATIONER.

english: Make sure to keep moving during combat, this increases your EVASION and makes you a harder target to hit.
translation: Sørg for at blive ved med at bevæge dig under kamp det øger din UNDVIGELSE og gør dig sværere at ramme.

english: You can see the range of weapons by hovering over them. Weapons will shoot at enemy ships in their range.
translation: Du kan se rækkevidden af ​​våben ved at holde musen over dem. Våbnene vil skyde mod fjendtlige skibe inden for deres rækkevidde.

english: Your guns can also target specific points on enemy ships. First, select which guns you would like to use. You can SHIFT CLICK to select multiple guns.
translation: Dine våben kan også sigte mod specifikke punkter på fjendtlige skibe. Vælg først hvilke våben du vil bruge. Du kan SHIFT-KLIKKE for at vælge flere våben.

english: Target their weapon systems so that they can't damage you further.
translation: Målret deres våbensystemer, så de ikke kan skade dig yderligere.

english: We are now going to learn some basic combat techniques.
translation: Vi skal nu lære nogle grundlæggende kampteknikker.

english: Well done. You have learned how to use weapons. Now fire at will at the pirate ship!
translation: Godt klaret. Du har lært at bruge våben. Skyd nu efter behag mod piratskibet!

english: Use your main ship engines to get close to the *X.
translation: Brug dine hovedmotorer til at komme tæt på *X.

english: In order to be able to dock successfully, your ship needs at least four working THRUSTERS.\n\nUse a different ship, or purchase and install four thrusters at a nearby trading post.
translation: For at kunne dokke korrekt skal dit skib have mindst fire fungerende MANØVRETHRUSTERS.\n\nBrug et andet skib eller køb og installér fire thrustere ved en nærliggende handelsstation.

english: Use your THRUSTERS to maneuver your ship so that RED diamonds of your docking ports align with the docking port of the *X. When aligned correctly, they will both turn YELLOW. Keep the ships aligned until the docking bridge is fully extended.
translation: Brug dine THRUSTERS til at manøvrere dit skib så de RØDE diamanter ved dine dokningsporte flugter med dokningsporten på *X. Når de er korrekt justeret vil de begge blive GULE. Hold skibene justeret indtil dokningsbroen er helt udtrukket.

english: Use the Maneuvering controls to move the ship into position.\n\nYou can also use the keys {ManoeuvreUp}, {ManoeuvreLeft}, {ManoeuvreDown}, {ManoeuvreRight} to move, and {ManoeuvreClockwise} and {ManoeuvreCounterClockwise} to rotate the ship.
translation: Brug manøvrekontrollerne til at flytte skibet på plads.\n\nDu kan også bruge tasterne {ManoeuvreUp}, {ManoeuvreLeft}, {ManoeuvreDown}, {ManoeuvreRight} til bevægelse og {ManoeuvreClockwise} samt {ManoeuvreCounterClockwise} til at rotere skibet.

english: We are now going to learn how to dock your ship to another ship.
translation: Vi skal nu lære, hvordan du dokker dit skib til et andet skib.

english: Well done. You have docked successfully!
